programme.desc: Celebrate the holidays with the renowned Mormon Tabernacle Choir. This season's cross-cultural spectacular features the world's leading tenor, Rolando Villazon, and seasonal favorites.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: The Durrells in Corfu
programme.desc: Leslie and Margo have news about their relationships, and as Louisa and Spiro grow closer, a circus comes to town.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Captive
programme.desc: When Atwater disappears at the house of a convicted felon, the evidence doesn't look promising as his belongings and blood have been left behind. Intelligence rallies to rescue him before it's too late. Atwater struggles for survival.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: A gang from El Salvador infiltrates Chicago and Intelligence works with a visiting detective to put an end to the crew's brutal tactics. Antonio finds himself getting close to the Salvadorian detective Marcella Gomez but learns she has a hidden motive.

programme.title: Modern Family: Undeck the Halls
programme.desc: Christmas is in full swing at the Dunphy house until the kids get in some trouble and Phil and Claire threaten to take away Christmas until one of them fesses up.

programme.title: Modern Family: Express Christmas
programme.desc: While gathered at Jay and Gloria's pool on a sunny December day, the family realizes that everyone will be scattered during the holidays, and that if they want to celebrate Christmas together, it will have to be today.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Old Man and the Tree
programme.desc: Jay takes Manny out to cut down their own Christmas tree, and Gloria is on edge with mom in town, but changes her tune when she sees her bonding with Claire. Then, Mitchell is forced to do last-minute shopping when they didn't get Lily the right gift.

programme.title: Modern Family: White Christmas
programme.desc: In an effort to have the picture-perfect white Christmas she's always dreamed of, Gloria rents a cabin in the mountains for the whole family to celebrate the holiday. Meanwhile, the family is also preoccupied with their own agendas.

programme.title: Modern Family: Snow Ball
programme.desc: When Manny and Luke put on the school's lavish winter dance and end up over their heads due to a texting error, it is up to them to fix it before the end of the night.

programme.title: Modern Family: Closet? You'll Love It!
programme.desc: A peeping-Tom in the neighbourhood keeps using a drone to spy on Gloria sun-bathing, so Phil, Luke and Manny make it their mission to take it down.

programme.title: Modern Family: Spring Break
programme.desc: Claire does some spring cleaning while Phil struggles with not being a spring chicken when Luke starts outperforming him. Haley takes Alex to a music festival to take her mind off college. Gloria and Jay challenge one another to give up soaps and cigars.

programme.title: Modern Family: Grill, Interrupted
programme.desc: Jay's birthday brings everyone together and Phil is beside himself over the super cool gift he got Jay, a high-tech outdoor grill. Claire and Mitch decide they will 'offer' to pay back the money Jay loaned them ages ago.

programme.title: Modern Family: Knock 'Em Down
programme.desc: Jay agrees to sub in on Cam's bowling team for the finals. Unfortunately Cam was not fully upfront about it being an all gay league, which puts Jay in a precarious position.

programme.title: Modern Family: Integrity
programme.desc: Phil and Jay run an errand together to pick up Lily's hand-me-down princess castle for Joe. However, both are in a mood because Phil is upset that Claire won't let him buy a video game console and Jay thinks Gloria is letting Joe play with girlie items.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Emotional Proximity
programme.desc: Olinsky's daughter remains in critical condition following a massive fire, leaving Intelligence on edge, but more determined than ever to track down the suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Remember the Devil
programme.desc: After being tipped off about a woman running barefoot through the woods, Intelligence is led to a kidnapping victim locked up in a shipping container.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Bit of Light
programme.desc: When Chicago's 'Nightcrawler' Bobby Trent is murdered over a single piece of footage, Intelligence must investigate one of Chicago's wealthiest families, uncovering a lineage of old money and secrets.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Last Minute Resistance
programme.desc: After encouraging her sister to spend a night out with friends, Burgess wakes up to find that Nicole never made it home. As the guilt begins to eat at Burgess, the team in Intelligence bands together to find Nicole.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Fish Guts and Glory

programme.desc: Michael is upset when he learns that Phyllis is going to be Santa at the office Christmas party. Jim and Dwight try to promote holiday spirit in the office, despite concerns over Dunder Mifflin. Oscar has a secret crush.

programme.title: The Office: Dwight Christmas
programme.desc: When the planning committee drops the ball on the annual Christmas party, Dwight arranges it himself.

programme.title: The Office: Classy Christmas
programme.desc: Michael could not be happier when he learns that Toby has to take a leave of absence and Holly is sent to cover for him. Pam is forced to do a second Christmas party when Michael wants the party to be on the day of Holly's return.

programme.title: The Office: Christmas Wishes
programme.desc: Andy tries to make this year's Christmas the best ever by granting each person a holiday wish. Meanwhile, Robert tries to drown his sorrows at the office party.

programme.title: The Office: Christmas Party
programme.desc: Morale at the office Christmas party hits an all-time low after Michael suggests a game of 'Yankee Swap' with the $20 secret Santa gifts and everyone vies for the iPod he bought for Ryan.

programme.title: The Office: Moroccan Christmas
programme.desc: Phyllis' Moroccan-themed holiday party goes up in flames when Meredith's hair catches on fire and Michael is forced to deal with the accident. Meanwhile, Dwight corners the market on the hottest toy of the season.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: Experts empower women seeking personal and professional growth in career and family.

programme.title: Movie: Mistletoe and Menorahs
programme.desc: After being enlisted by a co-worker's friend to decorate for the holidays. A young woman learns to appreciate various holiday traditions.

programme.title: Movie: Always and Forever Christmas
programme.desc: A woman inherits a year-round Christmas store in a small town.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Winter Song
programme.desc: A woman helps a former jazz singer reconnect with his family for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: The Road Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Two rival musicians find themselves working together to road trip to each other’s hometowns for Christmas.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: After seventeen years on death row for a mass murder at Chuck E. Cheese's restaurant in Aurora, Nathan Dunlap's fate resides in the hands of one man, Governor John Hickenlooper.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: A Prison of His Own
programme.desc: Nick Yarris's uncanny knowledge of a gruesome kidnapping and murder makes him a prime suspect and eventually lands him on death row. Twenty years later new evidence emerges.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: NYE Foul Play
programme.desc: In 1995, Hank Skinner was sentenced to death for a New Year's Eve triple-homicide of his family. Five years later, students from the Northwestern University start to examine the case and discover that key evidence was not examined for DNA.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: Investigators believed they were looking for 2 murder weapons and 2 suspects, until further analysis of evidence set them down a different path, closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Hikers discovered a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Authorities hydrated the fingers and obtained a fingerprint, enabling them to identify the victim. They also discovered a tuft of red carpet fibers on the sheets.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: When Trucks Fly
programme.desc: Professional off-road racer RJ Anderson enlists Heavy D to trick out his brand new Ford Raptor and add some serious towing capacity. Meanwhile, the Diesel Brothers challenge the Goons Garage and Welder Up to a Tuff Truck rematch in Mesquite, Nevada.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Prepare for Liftoff
programme.desc: The Diesel Brothers continue transforming their junkyard Bronco into an off-road beast for the Tuff Truck rematch against the Goons and Welder Up. Heavy D customizes a brand new UTV for his friend to break a world record at the live event.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Diesel Brothers Vs. The World
programme.desc: Get ready for a crazy night featuring an epic Blazer build, a wild race against a Lamborghini and a record breaking stunt. Then, a huge announcement with the Dirty Mudder Truckers.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Trucked Out: Blazer of Glory
programme.desc: Trucked Out with insider facts and extra scenes: The Diesel Brothers complete the ultimate diesel-powered party on wheels. Meanwhile, Diesel Dave convinces Heavy D to give his El Camino what she needs to get back on the road.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Don't Tread on Diesel
programme.desc: Heavy D puts the petal to the metal on his next SEMA build: a 6x6 with a custom full-track assembly that can handle any terrain in style. Meanwhile, Diesel Dave adds the finishing touches to his dream El Camino before revealing it at Monster Jam.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: Head on a Spike
programme.desc: The Dirty 7 faces off with Adrenaline Rush, a team of MegaTruck All Stars. An intense crash leads to medics stepping in, and Spiker raises the stakes to double or nothing.

programme.title: Twin Turbos: Shop Rod Rising
programme.desc: The DeBertis attempt to transform a classic van into a hot rod racing machine. Then, Brad gets practice with a hi-tech racing simulator but stumbles when it's time to compete in his next race.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Epic Fail of the Year
programme.desc: The Dieselsellerz pick up a vintage fire truck to transform into a tow truck that can carry everyone in the shop. Heavy D is determined to finish the endless Fail of the Year UTV build.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Don't Tread on Diesel
programme.desc: Heavy D puts the petal to the metal on his next SEMA build: a 6x6 with a custom full-track assembly that can handle any terrain in style. Meanwhile, Diesel Dave adds the finishing touches to his dream El Camino before revealing it at Monster Jam.

programme.title: Dirty Mudder Truckers: Head on a Spike
programme.desc: The Dirty 7 faces off with Adrenaline Rush, a team of MegaTruck All Stars. An intense crash leads to medics stepping in, and Spiker raises the stakes to double or nothing.

programme.title: Twin Turbos: Shop Rod Rising
programme.desc: The DeBertis attempt to transform a classic van into a hot rod racing machine. Then, Brad gets practice with a hi-tech racing simulator but stumbles when it's time to compete in his next race.

programme.title: Diesel Brothers: Flippin' Diesel
programme.desc: The diesel brothers are up against the clock for their SEMA build: a replica Ford Bronco made from an F350 and an Excursion. Heavy D brings in physics help to make his dream of a somersaulting truck come true.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Storm's a-Brewing
programme.desc: A monster storm hits the Carolinas and Jeff, Mark and Jim Tom risk their lives to run a batch of shine. Nearby, Josh and Bill fall prey to the same storm when a flood threatens their underground still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Shiner's Last Stand
programme.desc: Tickle splits from Tim, recruits a new still hand and heads into the woods to scout a new site. Mark, Jeff and Jim Tom double down and begin work on a second still to run barley scotch while Deputy Sheriff Chuck infiltrates an active moonshine operation.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Prophecy Fulfilled
programme.desc: Tickle builds a new still and heads out on a midnight run and Josh goes ballistic when he damages the nearly completed underground still site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle Goes Rogue
programme.desc: Tickle goes it alone after his still hand Howard gets spooked by an intruder and disappears. Meanwhile, Josh and Bill discover toxic black mould in their underground still site, and Jeff's wife and son set up a second still to run barley scotch.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Troubled Waters
programme.desc: An angry landowner busts Tickle, while Tim devises an ingenious new hiding spot for his backup stash of shine. Josh and Bill get into a bone-breaking fight at their new still site, and Mark bootlegs moonshine by canoe in the dead of night.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Adios, Mr. Still
programme.desc: Gunfire erupts in the bamboo patch just as Josh and Bill fire up their still for the first time this season. Meanwhile Jeff, Mark and Jim Tom run a batch of President George Washington's rye whiskey, and Tickle hits the skids when his still is sabotaged.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshine Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: Tim hunts for 200 gallons of high-dollar, 60-year-old shine trapped at the bottom of a lake as Mark and Jeff encounter a bandit stealing their shine. Meanwhile, Mike and Tweedy bootleg shine under a pile of horse manure.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hat in Hand
programme.desc: In debt to dangerous people, Tickle goes to Tim for help as Jeff, Mark and Jim Tom do battle with an angry nest of yellow jackets trying to lay claim to their still site. Josh comes to Cutie Pie's rescue when she gets hurt at the underground still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Last Shiner Standing
programme.desc: In the season finale, one moonshiner goes down as Tickle devises a bold but risky plan to sell Tim's shine. Josh and Bill's still site is compromised, while Jeff, Mark and Jim Tom brazenly run three stills. Finally, Deputy Sheriff Chuck makes his move.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Very Moonshiners Christmas: Delivery Time
programme.desc: Mark and Digger reflect back on one of their biggest batches ever. With a revolutionary still pot design and the help of Jim Tom, they crafted 150 gallons of brandy. Then, they have to figure out how to get it to their customers.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Very Moonshiners Christmas: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: With holiday cheer, Mark and Digger recall one of their favourite challenges, an impossible shine order they try to fulfill. Meanwhile, Lance and Jeff scramble when their bootlegger goes missing.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Very Moonshiners Christmas: Secret Ingredient
programme.desc: In the holiday spirit, Mark and Digger revisit some memorable moments. In a surprising twist, Lance shows Jeff an unorthodox moonshine ingredient, while Patti and David risk a supersized mega run.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive - Most Extreme: Battle with Chaos
programme.desc: If they don't change their extreme hoarding, Jeff might lose the children he adores and Debbie may never have children at all.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive - Most Extreme: Surviving on Trash
programme.desc: Enter the shocking world of the most extreme hoarders that have been featured.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive - Most Extreme: Somewhere in My Pile
programme.desc: Beverly's clutter fills every last square inch of her home. Upstairs, her three beloved dogs have made the space absolutely unlivable. With the threat of the city condemning her home, Beverly must clear the hoard or risk losing everything.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: The Truth Shall Set You Free
programme.desc: Michael and Juliana discuss a potential prenup. Angela goes wedding gown shopping. Emily and Sasha arrive in the U.S. Robert and Anny go apartment hunting. Anna gives Mursel an ultimatum before their wedding. Natalie panics about Mike.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Most Outrageous Moments
programme.desc: Relive the most outrageous moments on the show as we look back at some of our favourite couples. Through unforgettable arrivals, culture clashes, lies, skeptical family and breakdowns, each couple has fought to find lasting love across the globe.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: Judgement Day
programme.desc: Tania and Syngin struggle with communication. Juliana seeks independence. Religion divides Mike and Natalie. Mursel makes an important decision. Jasmin finds it hard to fit in. Anny's birthday gets wild. Angela hears news about Michael's visa.

programme.title: Unpolished: Come Home to Daddy
programme.desc: Lexi's creativity is pushed to the limit for her latest client's nails, but problems with technology threaten to make her experiment a failure. Bria and Matt arrive in Las Vegas to elope and the rest of the family slowly catches wind of their plan.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Most Outrageous Moments
programme.desc: Relive the most outrageous moments on the show as we look back at some of our favourite couples. Through unforgettable arrivals, culture clashes, lies, skeptical family and breakdowns, each couple has fought to find lasting love across the globe.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: Judgement Day
programme.desc: Tania and Syngin struggle with communication. Juliana seeks independence. Religion divides Mike and Natalie. Mursel makes an important decision. Jasmin finds it hard to fit in. Anny's birthday gets wild. Angela hears news about Michael's visa.

programme.title: Unpolished: Come Home to Daddy
programme.desc: Lexi's creativity is pushed to the limit for her latest client's nails, but problems with technology threaten to make her experiment a failure. Bria and Matt arrive in Las Vegas to elope and the rest of the family slowly catches wind of their plan.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Did I Hear Someone Say $16,000?
programme.desc: Randy's day is nonstop as he assists brides and auditions models for his runway show. Bride Emanuela wants a sexy ball gown and she's not afraid to throw her dad's budget out the window. Marlena is finally dress shopping for a wedding years in the making.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Race to the Altar
programme.desc: Rita is searching for the perfect 1940's style gown to match her theme. Natalie is searching for an untraditional gown that fits her full size frame.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You're Making Me Blush
programme.desc: Kara fell in love with a statement red dress at another salon, but her future mother-in-law has more traditional gown ideas. Sheena needs a colourful dress to wear to her Indian wedding reception. Later, Tamara tries on her dress for the first time.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Father Knows Dress
programme.desc: Caitie and her wedding planner father do not see eye-to-eye on a gown. Danielle lost her mother to cancer, so Dad steps in to help her make the big decision. Chic Ciccarelli is back for her fitting, channelling her deceased father every step of the way.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Top My Dream Dress!
programme.desc: Three brides hope Kleinfeld can top the dream dresses they've already found. Lucille found a satin dress, but still wants more bling. Dana is head-over-heels for a tulle gown her mom hates. Joan loves a dress back home but wants one unique to Kleinfeld.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Sexy Sells
programme.desc: Nik Wallenda pushes for his wife Erendira to choose a sexy gown – within limits! Amy returns for a dress that's even racier than her last one, but her twin still begs her to cover up. Jaya is hesitant to adhere to her fiancé's form fitting preference.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Performances Piece

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Things to Bring
programme.desc: Ree shares four potluck party ideas for the Christmas season. She makes cheery cheesecake Santa hats, a bruschetta bar to-go, Mediterranean artichoke dip with mini bagel chips and vanilla chocolate chip scones.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Eggs All Day
programme.desc: Trisha's sister, Beth, is thinking about owning her own chicken coop, so the Yearwood sisters head to their friend's farm to learn the basics! They return with more eggs than they can handle, so they decide to make an egg-centric menu.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Weekend Breakfast
programme.desc: Trisha invites her friends Julie and Mandy over for a special weekend breakfast. Julie arrives to help prepare the ultimate spread of bacon waffles with maple syrup, asparagus frittata, lemon blueberry bread and a cinnamon cereal cocktail.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: The Bluebird Cafe
programme.desc: Dishes include cornbread and chili bites, orange barbeque steak kabobs, and charred lemon ricotta dip with dippers.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Food Tour: Midwest Edition
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood takes a trip down memory lane, recreating her favorite dishes from her time on tour in the Midwest and sharing memories using her own photos and footage.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Naughty or Nice Holiday Party
programme.desc: Trisha and friends bake some "naughty or nice" themed holiday treats, like fallen angel cocktails and a menu of spicy meatballs.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Holiday Spirit
programme.desc: Molly Yeh celebrates her favourite time of the year by making a festive buffet for three generations of the family. There are pastrami meatballs, brussels sprouts latkes, rolled potato flatbreads and her speculoos-inspired airline cookie sheet cakes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Perfect Pies
programme.desc: Ree is baking up a storm on the Ranch. She starts with caramel apple pie and makes a retro frozen grasshopper pie. There's strawberry pretzel pie and mini blueberry galettes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Friendship Fiesta
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's daughter Alex and her best friends are heading to college, and while they have a dorm room craft day, Ree's cooking up a Tex-Mex feast with juicy marinated green chile chicken, spicy taco potatoes, and a layered Mexican salad.

programme.title: Chopped Junior: Holiday Gift Baskets
programme.desc: Young chefs celebrate the holidays with guest judge Corey Fogelmanis and a wrapped present in each round. Along with their seasonal surprises, the kids get cooking with duck in the first round, a popular protein in the entree basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Chinese New Year
programme.desc: Cue the fireworks as China's biggest holiday has its moment in the Chopped Kitchen! For the first course of their Chinese New Year feasts, the chefs must create appetizers using one of American diners' favorite Chinese dishes.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Stink. Stank. Stunk.
programme.desc: When a skunk comes seeking its annual revenge on Chef, Duncan sees it as an opportunity to get a vacation from daycare.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Look Who's Clocking
programme.desc: When Harold’s warnings not to mess with the clock go ignored, the kids are forced to save themselves when Duncan tears a hole in the fabric of time.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Harold Swatter and the Goblet of Flies
programme.desc: After finding what he believes to be a magic wand, Owen accidentally turns Harold into a housefly.

programme.title: Total DramaRama: Gnome More Mister Nice Guy
programme.desc: When the daycare gets taken over by evil gnomes, Duncan finds himself on the wrong team.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: Christmas
programme.desc: Santa Claus is coming to town. Unfortunately he gets run over by the Wattersons, so it’s up to them to save Christmas.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Deal
programme.desc: Richard decides that his work around the house is underappreciated by Nicole and goes on strike to prove it.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Petals
programme.desc: Gumball is the star of his own comic, but struggles to match up to his heroic alter-ego.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Puppets
programme.desc: Darwin is delighted when they discover their old childhood toys, but soon realizes that some things are best left in the past.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Lie
programme.desc: Gumball and Anais create a new holiday to cheer people up during January.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Uncle
programme.desc: The adventures of a blue cat named Gumball and his buddy Darwin, a goldfish with legs.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Grades
programme.desc: Miss Simian is amused when a failed test from Gumball's past brings down his grade point average, which means that he'll have to repeat kindergarten.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Diet
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin discover the reason Dad’s diet wasn’t working was that he was actually on ten diets and eating a meal for each of them.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Bottle Catch
programme.desc: Apple and Onion try to fit in to life in the big city.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Onionless
programme.desc: Apple tries to survive a weekend alone while taking care of Onion’s plant.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Hotdog's Movie Premiere
programme.desc: Apple and Onion try to fit in to life in the big city.

programme.title: Apple & Onion: Not Funny
programme.desc: With their six-month friend anniversary approaching, Apple has to find a way not to lose his best friend.

programme.title: American Dad!: For Whom the Sleigh Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Stan gives Steve a gun for Christmas, even though Francine warns him that Steve is too young. As usual, Stan ignores her, and when Steve accidentally shoots Santa, he sends the North Pole into a tizzy and jeopardizes Christmas.

programme.title: American Dad!: Season's Beatings
programme.desc: Father Donovan holds a Christmas play at the mall, casting Stan as Santa Claus and Roger as Jesus, but after the two get into a fight and cause a scene, Stan is kicked out of the church.

programme.title: American Dad!: Minstrel Krampus
programme.desc: It's holiday time in Langley Falls and Steve starts acting like a spoiled brat. So Stan takes him to see his incarcerated Grandpa Jack.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: South Africa's Legendary Beast
programme.desc: A recent sighting in South Africa of a bizarre beast - half human, half fish - draws Jeremy into the story of creature with ancient origins and a fearsome reputation.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Toxic Invader

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Jurassic River Beast
programme.desc: Tasmania is home to species found nowhere else on earth, including a colossal freshwater beast capable of breaking a person's arm. Jeremy Wade will venture into the island's dense, eerie forests in search of this formidable creature.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters: Cold Water Mystery
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade sets out to investigate reports of strange, alien species in the water surrounding the remote Aleutian Islands.

programme.desc: When a prominent Alderman known for urban revitalization efforts is killed, Intelligence looks into corruption in the neighborhood. Olinsky feels pressure after receiving an ultimatum from Woods.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Ghosts
programme.desc: Upton uses an old undercover identity to help take down a meth ring spearheaded by a former criminal contact. With pressure from Woods mounting, Voight calls in a favor from Olinsky.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Payback
programme.desc: A string of stash house robberies lead back to an unlikely individual. Voight confronts a key witness in the Bingham investigation.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Saved
programme.desc: Voight witnesses the kidnapping of a young woman with a mysterious connection to his past. Intelligence works to find a connection between her kidnapping and several bank robberies. Ruzek gets a tip that a grand jury has been summoned.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Allegiance
programme.desc: Halstead and Atwater go undercover to prevent military-grade weapons from hitting the street. Voight calls in a favor as a last-ditch effort to clear Olinsky's name for Bingham's murder.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Homecoming
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Intelligence seeks justice for Olinsky after he's stabbed in prison. Antonio's loyalty is tested when Woods looks to take down Voight once and for all.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Old Man and the Key
programme.desc: Grampa Simpson tries to win the affection of a sultry new woman at his retirement home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Tales From the Public Domain
programme.desc: Homer receives a letter from the library notifying him about a long overdue book.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Blame It on Lisa
programme.desc: The Simpsons travel to Rio de Janeiro to try to find a lost orphan boy that Lisa sponsored.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Weekend at Burnsies
programme.desc: Homer is prescribed medicinal marijuana after being attacked by a swarm of crows.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gump Roast
programme.desc: Friends, family and enemies gather to roast Homer, recalling his escapades over the years.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Am Furious Yellow
programme.desc: At Springfield's School Career Day, a cartoon animator inspires Bart to create a comic.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Sweetest Apu
programme.desc: Homer catches Apu cheating on his wife and has a difficult time keeping it to himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Little Girl in the Big Ten
programme.desc: Lisa attempts to fit in with the college girls by disguising her age and grade level.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Frying Game
programme.desc: Homer gets community service after being nabbed for threatening an endangered species.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Papa's Got a Brand New Badge
programme.desc: When Homer sparks an electrical blackout, the citizens of Springfield start looting.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XIII

programme.title: The Simpsons: How I Spent My Strummer Vacation
programme.desc: Homer is caught on tape complaining that having a family meant kissing his dreams goodbye.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart vs. Lisa vs. 3rd Grade

programme.title: The Simpsons: Large Marge

programme.title: The Simpsons: Helter Shelter

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Louse Detective
programme.desc: Homer and the family receive an invitation to Stagnant Springs Spa and head to the desert.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Special Edna

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Dad Who Knew Too Little

programme.title: The Simpsons: Strong Arms of the Ma
programme.desc: After Marge is attacked, she develops agoraphobia and is afraid to leave her home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pray Anything

programme.title: The Simpsons: Barting Over

programme.title: The Simpsons: I'm Spelling as Fast as I Can

programme.desc: A British filmmaker visits Bart's class to make a documentary about an American school.

programme.desc: Homer writes a song about his ill feelings for Ned Flanders and performs it at Moe's.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mystery of the Alien Asteroid
programme.desc: When a strange alien object is discovered speeding through the solar system, experts race to uncover if it's real evidence of extraterrestrial contact, or a deadly asteroid on a collision course with planet earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Secrets of the Seven Earths
programme.desc: The new discovery of seven alien Earth-like planets in a faraway solar system is a major milestone in our hunt for extraterrestrial life, and experts investigate the secrets of TRAPPIST-1's mysterious worlds to reveal if we're truly alone in the universe.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Alien Signals
programme.desc: NASA begins a strange experiment to communicate with dolphins, and experts investigate if it's a prelude to making alien contact. However, some fear that such a discovery could have apocalyptic consequences.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens in the Amazon
programme.desc: After Neil Armstrong's moonwalk, he led an expedition into the Amazon to find a legendary library that holds all knowledge of an advanced alien civilization. Experts ask if a close encounter on the moon's surface inspired Armstrong's mysterious quest.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Secret Spaceship
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal strange and alien evidence that might provide answers to the universe's greatest secrets and mysteries.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Planet of the Metal Aliens
programme.desc: After a strange discovery confirms that life is possible on its surface, scientists begin to investigate if a nearby exoplanet could be home to an alien civilization.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Interstellar Gold Rush
programme.desc: A distant planet shows evidence of an Earth-like atmosphere, while a mysterious glowing light suggests the impossible - an atmosphere on the Moon. Have we found evidence of a crashed alien ship on the asteroid belt and why are there blueberries on Mars?

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens vs. Stalin at Area 51
programme.desc: When a former Area 51 insider alleges that the Roswell UFO incident was a nefarious Soviet conspiracy masterminded by Stalin, experts investigate if it was indeed an enemy plot against America, or whether the confession is just another cover-up.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Planet of the Metal Aliens
programme.desc: After a strange discovery confirms that life is possible on its surface, scientists begin to investigate if a nearby exoplanet could be home to an alien civilization.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did We Nuke Jupiter?
programme.desc: Find out if NASA could be responsible for a nuclear explosion on Jupiter. Also, new evidence could reveal the truth behind the mystery of the iconic face on Mars. Plus, learn about an unknown force that crashed an Apollo spacecraft on the moon.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of Troy
programme.desc: The legendary lost city at the center of the Trojan War is Troy, but its existence has never been confirmed. Now, discoveries and cutting-edge science might prove if this place existed, and if the Greeks really conquered it with the infamous Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Buried City
programme.desc: There's a lost city buried in the Sahara, and evidence reveals it's home to Nefertiti, Tutankhamun, and the forbidden god of an outlawed religion. Experts uncover the secret doomsday that caused this strange place to disappear.

programme.title: Unearthed: Tower of Babel: The New Evidence
programme.desc: The Tower of Babel is one of the most famous stories of the Bible, and to find out if it really existed, archaeologists use cutting-edge tech and the latest science to investigate how ancient engineers could have built such an extraordinary megastructure.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hitler's Lost Bunker
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's underground bunker was the home of some of the greatest secrets of the Nazi's. Now, experts use cutting-edge tech to discover new evidence of Hitler's evil vision for global domination.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Crocodile Queen
programme.desc: The Crocodile Queen was Egypt's first female pharaoh, but we don't who she was, or why she took this sinister alter-ego. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Tomb Raiders
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the secrets of Egypt's tomb raiders, and what ancient Egyptians did to ensure the treasures of their dead pharaohs wouldn't be stolen. The latest science answers these great mysteries, shedding new light on Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: American Justice: The Monster Inside
programme.desc: In a controversial case, rapist Rex Allen Krebs was found guilty of murder in 2001.

programme.title: American Justice: Blood Brothers: The Derek and Alex King Case
programme.desc: Witness the shocking story of how two young Florida boys were led to kill their father.

programme.title: Nightwatch: When Work Becomes Family
programme.desc: It's New Year's in New Orleans and gun violence is rampant as police and EMS deal with armed robberies and shootings. Plus, EMT Gavin returns to the job, and everyone celebrates a new addition to the family.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Not Today
programme.desc: Yonkers first responders face unexpected challenges when they respond to a call for a man with a broken ankle who fell from a fire escape. In Tucson, Steven and Sam are called to a structure fire and must search inside for possible victims.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning
programme.desc: Horning goes to the one place he thinks he'll never be found, the Grand Canyon. Living off the land, he evades capture in the longest and largest manhunt in Arizona state history.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Darli
programme.desc: An incredible international manhunt ensues when a player in Miami's drug world goes on the lam.

programme.title: Female Forces: For Better or for Worse
programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.title: Female Forces: Ready to Rumble
programme.desc: The women of Naperville PD show just how tough they are as they combat out of control suspects including a kid who tries to charge one of the officers and a mother with a violent daughter seeking advice.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic?: Part 2: The Hunt
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains at large. A cavalcade of suspects emerges, each more compelling than the last. Investigators explore each one. Then, 106 days after Amy was taken, a gruesome discovery some 50 miles away from her Bay Village home: a body.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Who Killed Amy Mihaljevic?: Part 3: New Evidence
programme.desc: Amy's killer remains on the loose and the case goes nationwide. Margaret appears on Oprah, anniversaries come and go, and then, finally, a confession. A man stands up in church in a neighboring town and declares: 'I killed Amy Mihaljevic.'

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: The Butcher of Buffalo
programme.desc: Mother of three Joan Giambra is discovered strangled, lying naked under her comatose 11-year old daughter. The young girl becomes the only hope of catching a serial killer.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: High School Horror
programme.desc: When the body of beautiful high school student Debbie Gama is discovered in a creek wrapped in wire, the ensuing investigation ends up uncovering more than her murderer, revealing a secret world of twisted sex, drugs, sadomasochism and bondage.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Alley of Death
programme.desc: When 14-year old Gloria Pointer is found raped and murdered in an alleyway, it is the start of a thirty-year quest for answers by her mother who will not give up until she finds justice for her daughter.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Missing Half
programme.desc: In Dayton, Ohio, a young mother goes missing after attending a party late one evening. As her whereabouts remain unknown for days, the missing woman's identical twin is convinced there is something deeply sinister at play.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Killing in Chinatown
programme.desc: Art imitates life when Cambodian genocide survivor Dr. Haing Ngor wins an Oscar for his role in the film The Killing Fields. But when he's gunned down the LAPD investigate a web of political intrigue, revenge and street gangs to uncover the truth.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Missing Half
programme.desc: In Dayton, Ohio, a young mother goes missing after attending a party late one evening. As her whereabouts remain unknown for days, the missing woman's identical twin is convinced there is something deeply sinister at play.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Nine Years in the Shadows
programme.desc: When a young woman is found murdered in her Modesto, CA home in 1988, police investigate the strife and infidelity on both sides of her marriage. But it's a surprising witness who eventually leads police to her killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: A Killing in Chinatown
programme.desc: Art imitates life when Cambodian genocide survivor Dr. Haing Ngor wins an Oscar for his role in the film The Killing Fields. But when he's gunned down the LAPD investigate a web of political intrigue, revenge and street gangs to uncover the truth.

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Alley of Death
programme.desc: When 14-year old Gloria Pointer is found raped and murdered in an alleyway, it is the start of a thirty-year quest for answers by her mother who will not give up until she finds justice for her daughter.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Stuck in a Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt for a pyromaniac with a fiery temper and a callous disregard for human life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Too Young to Die
programme.desc: An ambush at a hamburger stand leaves a 16-year old dead. Lt. Joe Kenda must cut through rumor and innuendo in order to zero in on his prime suspect. But before he can catch the killer, a surprise witness blows the case wide open.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it's up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent. Then A shooting in a dive bar leads to a quick arrest, but Kenda can't quite shake the feeling that something is amiss.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Settle the Score
programme.desc: When Johnny Crawford is killed in his easy chair, police are perplexed to learn he may have been shot over a musical instrument. But as Lt. Joe Kenda digs deeper, it soon becomes clear the young man wasn't killed for his own sins...but someone else's.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: My Case to Solve
programme.desc: A jealous vendetta leaves a popular DJ dead, and his killer has dropped off the map. As a newly promoted supervisor, Sgt. Joe Kenda gambles his career on a risky strategy to bring his prime suspect to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: End of Days
programme.desc: The discovery of a family home littered with corpses tasks Kenda with unspooling the paranoid obsessions of a diseased mind, and forces him to confront his greatest fear. Then a deadly beating a cheap motel illuminates the dark underbelly of love.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: When a squabble at a store turns violent, Raymond Archuleta steps in to help- only to be stabbed through the heart. Lt Joe Kenda must solve the case with little evidence besides a bloody bouquet, and a sketch of the mystery woman last seen holding them.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Fractured Glass
programme.desc: When affable ladies' man Michael Tittemore is gunned down in the dead of night, Kenda first sets his sights on the roommates who were present during the murder. But a shocking revelation will turn his attention to a far more nefarious band of suspects.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Shattered
programme.desc: When two teens discover a lifeless body in the street, Lt. Joe Kenda must determine if the killer was a jealous lover or just plain unhinged. Then Kenda turns to a forensic expert to see if a young mother could possibly have hung herself.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Drive Thru Murder
programme.desc: Hard-working fast food manager Missy Berry was found dead in an idling car at a deserted intersection.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Sacrificial Lamb
programme.desc: When thirteen-year-old PJ Grant is found dead from a single gunshot wound to the head, Lt. Joe Kenda assumes it's a suicide. But when the physical evidence doesn't add up, it opens the door to a world of possibilities-from hatred to human sacrifice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer. Then... a young man's murder looks like a robbery gone wrong until Kenda learns the odd reason he's living there.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Firepower
programme.desc: Take a look at some of the world's most powerful man-portable weapons. Psychological impact and the power to intimidate, firepower systems have the military capability to unleash tremendous force on the enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Robotic Warriors
programme.desc: Robotic Warriors are futuristic unmanned war machines that can even think for themselves. These intelligent weapon systems combine stealth and autonomy with the power to strike and destroy their targets.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: Shock and Awe weapons are designed to make a massive impact. These rapid dominance systems overpower in the most effective ways, physically and psychologically overtaking the enemy.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Close Quarter Battle
programme.desc: Explore the chosen weapons when engaging the enemy at short range. The decision could mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: What History Forgot: To the Ends of the World
programme.desc: Delve into the unknown stories behind some of the biggest disasters, threats and conquests in America's skies. From the attack on Pearl Harbor, the Hindenburg disaster, Apollo 13 and the race to the Moon.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secret Weapons
programme.desc: Discover the unknown stories of some of the incredible plots, ploys and people behind America's secret weapons during the Cold War, the Vietnam War, and WWII.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: Rosa parks was not the first African American women to refuse to give up her seat. The Berlin Airlift included candy for kids. One of the great rifles used in war was invented by a man who made moonshine.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: Tank Battles of Korea
programme.desc: In 1950 the world is caught off guard as North Korea launches a massive armoured assault into South Korea. This is the story of the American tankers who rush to the aid of the South and the bloody battles they fight up and down the Korean Peninsula.

programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Mystery House
programme.desc: Michael surprises Ashley with an 1893 raised cottage that he purchased before seeing the full interior. The duo soon finds themselves in over their heads when they realize it's not quite the hidden gem Michael thought it was.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From an Apple Orchard into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew head into the mountains to salvage different structures of an old apple orchard. Key finds include roof tin, apple picking ladders, and apple crates. Robert also helps Ted build a commissioned iron gate.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items in Roanoke, VA, Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: At the warehouse, Mike builds a coffee table from a panel door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Virginia Tobacco Plant
programme.desc: Robert takes the team to tobacco country where they tackle a cigarette factory, without an elevator, on the hottest day of the year. With the Dawg Bowl opening just around the corner, Mike and Tay shift their focus to a lovable piece for the venue.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items in Boardman, Oh, into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: Mike builds a bed frame from horse jump poles; the crew brings in an expert.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From Columbus, Ohio Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: The guys tackle disassembling a 40 foot Eiffel Tower replica in Columbus. While there, they meet a fellow salvager and pick through his collection. Grayson also builds a floor lamp with salvaged materials back at the warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Mary's Rectory
programme.desc: The team finds cast-iron mantles, a built-in cabinet, and a stained glass front doorway.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: American Viscose Plant
programme.desc: The Dawgs save a kiln from the American Viscose Plant in Roanoke, VA. Mike and Tay work together to build custom tables for a local optometrist office. Will Farmer also returns to appraise a map from 1853.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Beechcraft Airplane Salvage
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs try something a little different by bidding on a 1947 Beechcraft airplane. Mike goes a little over budget to win the auction and the crew has to hire professionals to figure out how to disassemble it properly.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Alaska Flip N Move: Cozy Lake Cabin Almost Becomes an Icy Underwater House
programme.desc: The Sikes family takes a chance on a lake house that has potential but may be too hard to move. They run into a major snag when they try and take the shortest route for the move, which happens to be straight across a frozen lake.

programme.title: Alaska Flip N Move: Barn Top vs. Container Cabin
programme.desc: Flipping friends Bob and Jubal take the empty top half of an old barn and turn it into a modern, open-concept living space. Meanwhile, the Merricks get a bargain on a shipping container, but they have to move it down an icy mountain road.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Taking It to the Finish Line
programme.desc: Chase and the team are hired to finish a cabin for a homeowner that's been collecting materials for years but just hasn't been able to finish the project.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Inspirations Brewing
programme.desc: When Chase and his brother-in-law learn that the owner of their latest cabin project works at Allagash Brewing Company, they're excited to check out the brewery for inspiration as they turn the weekend getaway into a three-season home away from home.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the Bride
programme.desc: Chase and his team are back home in Augusta getting ready for Lance's wedding. Chase gets a call about a little log cabin stuck in a backyard. He sees the cabin as a fun project for the team to work on and present to Lance's lovely bride.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Beauty and the Beef
programme.desc: It's love at first bite as Noah Cappe munches on some Texas-sized treats at Rodeo Austin. With a tagline of "where Western meets weird," the Rodeo is the place to find one-of-a-kind carnival eats like the Kobe beef Rodeo Austin burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mocktail
programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes loco for Sunshine State snacks at the Manatee County Fair in Palmetto, Fla. There's lots of ooey-gooey goodness in the pizza supremo burger and the ulti-melt burger, but it's the sandia loca that has Noah flipping out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There Will Be Bacon
programme.desc: Noah Cappe pigs out at the Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla., where all-American classics make an appearance in the stuffed crust bacon-za, but it's the peanut butter pork donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet Of The Dates
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is ready for 1,001 nights of fun at the Arabian Nights-themed Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival in Indio, Calif. He makes a date with a dangerous burger and enjoys a sweet mashup with the churro dog.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Worcester, MA
programme.desc: Casey Webb lands in Worcester, MA, where he slurps down some radical ramen, indulges in peanut butter cup French toast and takes on a rack of deep-fried ribs with the heat of a million Scoville units.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Milwaukee, WI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Milwaukee for some epic Brew City eats, including a pitcher-sized Bloody Mary garnished with a whole chicken and a four-and-a-half-pound Reuben sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Holiday Delights
programme.desc: Nothing says 'Happy Holidays' like having all your favourite festive foods in one place. Brad Miller finds the Yuletide spirit with his favorite holiday steak from Harry's Savoy Grill in Wilmington, Del.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mexican Favorites
programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Pie's the Limit
programme.desc: From savory to sweet and cheesy to meaty, the pie possibilities are endless. Wolfgang Puck picks a perfect fruit and cream pie in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Terrific Italian
programme.desc: Celebrity chefs and Cooking Channel personalities are talking about the most sensational Italian food they've ever had. Alton Brown revisits a decadent, old-world pasta dish.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Comforting Classics
programme.desc: There's nothing quite as comforting as a classic, down-home meal that reminds you of the good old days. For Ted Allen, it's a cinnamon roll, and for Giada De Laurentiis, it has to be pot pie.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Southern Eats
programme.desc: It's time for some good, old-fashioned country cooking as Guy Fieri, Alton Brown, Sunny Anderson and Duff Goldman round up their favorite Southern eats.

programme.title: Food's Greatest Hits: Snack Attack
programme.desc: Come spoil your dinner with us as we attack some of food's greatest snacks deep-fried bites, chips and dip, plus everyone's fave, popcorn.

programme.title: Food's Greatest Hits: Sugar Rush
programme.desc: We're looking at three of food's sweetest hits including ice cream sundaes and cupcakes.

programme.title: Food's Greatest Hits: Super Cheesy
programme.desc: Outrageously cheesy dishes in all their melty glory get the all-star treatment, with macaroni and cheese, grilled cheese sandwiches and cheesecake front and center.

programme.title: Food's Greatest Hits: Diner Delights
programme.desc: Food's Greatest Hits gets its diner on, serving up three quintessentially American dishes: juicy burgers, sky-high club sandwiches, and creamy milkshakes.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Charleston
programme.desc: Ali heads south to Charleston and starts the day off right with creamy grits topped with all the morning classics. Then a crab cake sandwich that's the talk of the town, followed by seafood-stuffed hushpuppies.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Miami
programme.desc: Ali travels to Miami and breaks his fast with a classic Cuba staple: empanadas. He then samples some fruits of the sea, with right-off-the-boat mahi mahi sandwiches and a fisherman's stew.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Albuquerque
programme.desc: While Albuquerque is known for hatch green chile and New Mex cuisine, Ali Khan discovers a lot more behind the hype. Ali goes sweet on a vegan waffle that delivers like a decadent desert; then makes way for the best green chile cheeseburger in town.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Chicago
programme.desc: Ali Khan's Windy City expectations are as high as Chicago's Willis Tower, so his breakfast is a tower of fried chicken, biscuits, egg and bacon. For lunch, Ali dives into the city's unofficial sandwich, the Italian beef.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Great Lakes Craves
programme.desc: Ali Kahn digs into the best deals in Grand Rapids with a twilight French toast glistening with creamy anglaise sauce. For lunch, it's a Mexican fiesta with layers of juicy pork torta de jamon.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Mountain Feast
programme.desc: Ali hits the Jackson Hole, Wyo., trail running for a delicious croque madame with mornay sauce in the morning and crosses the Snake River for a crunchy fried chicken banh mi sandwich.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Fillin' Up in the South
programme.desc: Ali Khan hits the ground running in Richmond, Va., at a bakery that puts a spicy twist on a traditional Southern biscuit.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Pit Stop
programme.desc: Pittsburgh has Ali Khan flipping over some cheesy pancakes, and battles a sub that might blow the classic Philly cheesesteak out of the water. He discovers the secrets to Pittsburgh's best pretzels.

programme.title: Good Eats: 'Twas the Night Before Good Eats
programme.desc: A dark holiday night finds Alton Brown visited by a series of culinary spirits that drive him to prepare long lost yuletide classics.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Roadside 'Cue
programme.desc: While road-tripping through Texas, Roger Mooking pulls the car over for some seriously delicious barbecue. In San Antonio, he makes a pit stop at The Box Street Social food truck to hang chickens and racks of ribs over a live fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pit Bosses
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is honoring the legendary pitmasters who make some of the country's best barbecue.
