programme.title: SEC Featured: LSU
programme.desc: A wrap-up of the latest SEC features where fans can see the stories beyond the sidelines.

programme.title: Homecoming With Willie Geist
programme.desc: Finebaum chats with Vanderbilt graduate, television personality and journalist Willie Geist.

programme.title: Homecoming With Titus O'Neil
programme.desc: Finebaum chats with former American football player and current professional wrestler Titus O'Neil.

programme.title: Homecoming With Tim Cook
programme.desc: Auburn alumnus and current Apple CEO Tim Cook discusses his time on campus and his memories of watching the Auburn Tigers.

programme.title: Homecoming With Marillyn Hewson
programme.desc: Paul Finebaum chats with Marillyn Hewson, the chairman, president, and chief executive officer of Lockheed Martin.

programme.title: Homecoming With Billy Payne
programme.desc: Paul Finebaum sits down with Billy Payne, an SEC alumnus, former Augusta National Golf Club chairman and CEO of the organizing committee for the 1996 Olympics.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Mighty Ruthie
programme.desc: Auburn Tiger and Olympic gold medalist Ruthie Bolton is a victim of domestic violence and uses her platform to become an advocate for women's empowerment.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Repeat After Us
programme.desc: Florida's big five return for the 2007 season to become the first school to repeat as basketball national champions with the same starting lineup.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Maravich
programme.desc: Explores the life of 'Pistol' Pete Maravich, one of the most prolific scorers and compelling personalities in basketball history.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Rebel
programme.desc: The story of Johnny Neumann, a prodigy who let his ego get in the way of his success.

programme.title: SEC Storied: 40 Minutes of Hell
programme.desc: Look at the rise, fall and redemption of University of Arkansas coach Nolan Richardson.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Norm
programme.desc: Chronicling the life of Missouri men's basketball coaching legend Norm Stewart, centering on Stewart's life as an athlete, a husband, a coach and a cancer survivor.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Abby Head On
programme.desc: A look at soccer player Abby Wombach's perseverance to excel in her sport and become one of the best athletes the United States has ever produced.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Stars Are Aligned
programme.desc: Fourteen celebrities and public figures each representing a different school from the Southeastern Conference talk about their emotional connection to their respective college and the SEC and explain why they'll never forget where they came from.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Sarah and Suzanne
programme.desc: Alabama's Sarah Patterson and Georgia's Suzanne Yoculan took their schools' gymnastics program from the verge of folding to the best in the country.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Lolo Jones
programme.desc: Lori 'Lolo' Jones was a standout hurdler from LSU where she won 3 NCAA titles and 11 All-American honors. Lolo explores her inspiring rise from an unstable home life to national stardom that included a spot on the 2008 United States Olympic team.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Dominique Belongs to Us
programme.desc: Dominique Wilkins was the toast of his hometown in Washington, N.C. After choosing the University of Georgia over local ACC schools, his fans' cheers turned to jeers. The betrayal left him distrustful of fans until fan support paved his way home.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Shaq & Dale
programme.desc: This film follows former basketball great Shaquille O'Neal as he returns to LSU to visit Dale Brown. The relationship forged between these two men goes back to when Shaq was 13 and since that day they have formed a deep friendship.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Miracle 3
programme.desc: The story of Mykal Riley's desperation three-point shot that sent the Crimson Tide into overtime of the 2008 SEC basketball tournament and saved thousands of fans from an oncoming tornado.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Scramblin' Fran
programme.desc: 'Scramblin'' Fran Tarkenton's path is chronicled from quarterback at Georgia to three Super Bowl championships with the Minnesota Vikings.

programme.title: SEC Storied: King George
programme.desc: George Washington Rogers, winner of the Heisman Trophy in 1980, tells the story of his life.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Play That Changed College Football
programme.desc: Look at the inaugural SEC championship game in 1992 and the impact it's had on college football.

programme.title: Speak for Yourself With Whitlock and Wiley
programme.desc: Jason Whitlock and Marcellus Wiley cover all of the headlines and most provocative stories from different angles.

programme.title: Lock It In
programme.desc: Host Rachel Bonnetta joined by Clay Travis, Todd Fuhrman, and 'Cousin Sal' Locono present a one-of-a-kind daily sports show featuring the world of sports gambling. See what the experts are saying and who they are putting their hypothetical money on.

programme.title: Fair Game With Kristine Leahy: Tom Schaar
programme.desc: USA Skateboarding National Team member Tom Schaar talks about landing the historic first ever 1080, the camaraderie of the skateboarding community, and how he plans both to qualify for the Tokyo Olympics and bring home the Gold.

programme.title: NASCAR Race Hub: Best of Features: Part 2
programme.desc: Highlights, news, opinion and a heavy dose of unexpected fun.

programme.title: U.S. Open Epics: Tiger Woods: Perfection at Pebble
programme.desc: In 2000 Tiger Woods was at the top of his game. And over four days at Pebble Beach that June, Woods conquered the course, the field, and the record books on his way to his first U.S. Open victory and what many say is 'The Greatest Golf Ever Played.'

programme.title: 2019 U.S. Open: Woodland Peaks at Pebble Beach
programme.desc: Relive the dramatic 2019 U.S. Open at Pebble Beach. Gary Woodland overcame personal and professional obstacles on his way to winning his first major championship at one of the most historic venues in golf.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company

programme.title: Christmas at Belmont

programme.title: Christmas With the Mormon Tabernacle Choir: Featuring Kristin Chenoweth
programme.desc: The Tabernacle Choir and Orchestra at Temple Square are joined by Kristin Chenoweth, Emmy and Tony award-winning actress and singer, for this beloved Christmas tradition featuring favorite holiday music, dancing and storytelling.

programme.title: Frontline: Poor Kids

programme.title: Emery Blagdon and His Healing Machine
programme.desc: With pliers in hand, artist Emery Blagdon fashions pieces of wire into patterns attached with foil, beads and ribbons.

programme.title: Independent Lens: Supergirl

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow: Mansion Masterpieces
programme.desc: History meets fantasy with treasures fit for a period costume drama, including a 1907 Robert Henri oil painting, a late 16th-century diamond marriage jewel and an English giltwood cabinet-on-stand.

programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: New Challenges
programme.desc: Mary Ann introduces a new abdominal exercise called the 'Ski Jump' and Gretchen gives you a new balance challenge.

programme.title: Arthur: Sue Ellen Adds It Up/ Wish You Were Here

programme.title: Nature Cat: A Nature Carol

programme.title: Wild Kratts: A Creature Christmas

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About Christmas!

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Masterclass Two

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Victoria: Foreign Bodies

programme.title: Victoria and Albert: The Wedding

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Behind the Mystery Special
programme.desc: Learning more about Blastic Plasmacytoid Dendritic Cell Neoplasm an aggressive and often fatal blood cancer.

programme.title: Movie: Staging Christmas
programme.desc: Asked to stage a home for the holidays, a young woman finds the owner is also in need for some holiday cheer.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas à la Mode
programme.desc: A young woman comes up with a plan to save her family's dairy farm by holding a contest for a holiday ice cream flavor.

programme.title: Movie: Grounded for Christmas
programme.desc: When a winter storm grounds flights, a young woman invites a fellow pilot to stay at her parent's home for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Louisiana
programme.desc: When a young woman returns home for Christmas she discovers the magic of the season.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Blanket of Evidence
programme.desc: When two women are murdered in a state park, Indiana police suspected a serial killer, until they looked at the evidence more deeply and were brought in totally different directions.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: George Michael's Final Days
programme.desc: George Michael's life as international super star came to a mysterious and tragic end on Christmas Eve 2016. Family and fans were shocked by his sudden death. What happened the night he died?

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Who Killed JonBenet Ramsey
programme.desc: Investigating a wide range of suspects and evidence in the killing of JonBenet, including the Ramsey's maid, and the man who portrayed Santa Claus at a holiday party, only days before JonBenet was found murdered.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Did Scott Peterson Murder Laci?
programme.desc: A tale of murder, adultery, courtroom drama, and ultimately the death penalty. The story of Scott and Laci Peterson as told by those who lived it.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: After seventeen years on death row for a mass murder at Chuck E. Cheese's restaurant in Aurora, Nathan Dunlap's fate resides in the hands of one man, Governor John Hickenlooper.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: NYE Foul Play
programme.desc: In 1995, Hank Skinner was sentenced to death for a New Year's Eve triple-homicide of his family. Five years later, students from the Northwestern University start to examine the case and discover that key evidence was not examined for DNA.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: A Prison of His Own
programme.desc: Nick Yarris's uncanny knowledge of a gruesome kidnapping and murder makes him a prime suspect and eventually lands him on death row. Twenty years later new evidence emerges.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Very Moonshiners Christmas: Tickle's Homecoming
programme.desc: Mark and Digger reflect on one of the most memorable moments of the season: Tickle's homecoming in the Appalachian backwoods after a year in jail. Eager to get back to work, Tickle recruits an old friend to help re-stake his claim as an outlaw shiner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Very Moonshiners Christmas: Take Two
programme.desc: Mark and Digger look back at when they re-discovered Popcorn Sutton’s mystery multi-grain shine. Meanwhile, Tickle returns to the woods with two notorious outlaw shiners.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Very Moonshiners Christmas: Unruly Herd
programme.desc: With holiday humor, Mark and Digger recall the time they had to contend with an unruly herd of cattle standing between them and their new still site. Meanwhile, Tickle pulls Tim back to the woods to make some outlaw shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Very Moonshiners Christmas: If You Build It
programme.desc: Mark and Digger look back on their big bet that Popcorn's multigrain shine will haul in huge profits if they can just nail the recipe. But first, they have to build a brand new 350-gallon still designed to make moonshine just like their mentor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Very Moonshiners Christmas: Spoils of Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger remember when they had to scramble to save their Popcorn Sutton legacy mash before it spoils and they lose any potential profit.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Very Moonshiners Christmas: Walk the Line
programme.desc: Mark and Digger recall convincing a former foe to bootleg their triple grain shine across county lines and trying to turn wedding cake into moonshine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Very Moonshiners Christmas: Something to Proof
programme.desc: Mark and Digger fondly recall their legendary vodka, handmade with an ingenious hillbilly hack. Meanwhile, Tickle gets out of jail and Tim must keep him busy, but Tickle has his own ideas.

programme.title: Moonshiners: A Very Moonshiners Christmas: Lost and Found
programme.desc: At the holidays, Mark and Digger look back with cheer at their discovery of a trove of Popcorn's infamous shine.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Crocodile Love Story
programme.desc: It's moving day for Acco, the zoo's biggest crocodile. All goes to plan until his mate Cassie goes into hiding as the team races to reunite the bonded pair in their new enclosure. The rescue unit fights to save a flying fox entangled in barbed wire.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Oscar the Grouchy Frogmouth
programme.desc: Terri returns to her hometown in Oregon to help Brady, a cougar in need of a vital health check. At the zoo, Robert is on a mission to rescue Oscar, a small bird with a big attitude, and Bindi bathes an echidna with bad skin allergies.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Human Kannonball
programme.desc: With odds stacked against them, a bodyguard, a firefighter and an ultra-fit football coach take on three massive grizzlies in a gauntlet of challenges. As they fight for a place in the finale, each discovers just how badly bears don't like to lose.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: An Army veteran, an ultra-marathoner, and a world record weightlifter face the biggest battles of their lives as they take on Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank in challenges of strength, speed, and strategy, but it's the underdog who shocks Bear Mountain.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: You're Cut Off
programme.desc: The guys pose as employees at a copy centre, conduct bizarre exit interviews for moviegoers and then lead some very peculiar protests. Later, it's unhappy hour for tonight's big loser, as he cuts off paying customers at a party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The Jokers that are big pro wrestling fans, and how long it took Joe to recover from his Sumo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Everything's Just Rosie
programme.desc: How many pounds of potatoes were made for the famous Scoopski Potatoes challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Centaur of Attention
programme.desc: The guys go head-to-head in a focus group, and then spread some confusion at a bagel store before heading to the park where they hit all the wrong notes. Finally, tonight's biggest loser gets hunted down during a truly humiliating walk of shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pineapple Breeze
programme.desc: Michael reveals an exciting new way to fix a tablet, makes a drink that's impossible to swallow and turns a dog into the smartest animal in the world.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Total Face Rejuvenation
programme.desc: Michael shocks a receptionist with a medical procedure and later reveals a regenerating piece of gum. Plus, an electrifying trick rewrites history.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: You've Been Marked
programme.desc: Michael shows off a seashell from the seashore that still has the seashore in it and reveals desserts that break the mold. Plus, at a farm, Michael startles his assistant with a trick that's 'out-of-this-world.'

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli has invited her local firefighters over for a big game day feast to thank them for fighting a brush fire near her house. Her table is ablaze with a pot of four alarm ribeye chili, spicy, cheesy pull-apart bread and more!

programme.desc: Bad weather outside is perfect for snuggling inside, so Valerie Bertinelli and her husband, Tom, make comforting stay-at-home recipes like shrimp scampi with herb breadcrumbs, pull-apart garlic bread with asiago, and Helen's orange and fennel salad.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Jet Lag Dinner
programme.desc: After a week of non-stop travel, Valerie Bertinelli isn't sure what time zone she's in, so she decides a sweet and savory breakfast-for-dinner will make a nice homecoming to share with her husband, Tom.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Tikis and Tinsel
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is inspired to do some holiday entertaining, and to celebrate the completion of her backyard tiki bar, she's hosting a retro cocktail party complete with tiki torches, Polynesian-inspired bites and plenty of tinsel.

programme.title: Dateline Extra: The Sting

programme.title: Dateline: Dark Valley
programme.desc: When film executive Gavin Smith vanishes, Los Angeles detectives search for clues amid reported sightings and suspicious circumstances. The case takes a dramatic turn when Gavin’s wife reveals painful secrets.

programme.title: Dateline: Black Friday
programme.desc: Fort Worth, Texas police are called to the scene of a brutal murder on Black Friday. The victim is beloved by friends, girlfriends and coworkers. She seemed to have no enemies, but did she?

programme.title: Dateline Extra: Out There in the Dark
programme.desc: Dennis Murphy reports on the death of a young mother in Ohio and the investigation spanning years and multiple states.

programme.title: Dateline: The Women and Dirty John

programme.title: Dateline: As Night Fell
programme.desc: A young woman is shot in her home just outside Salt Lake City, Utah.

programme.title: Dateline: Good and Evil
programme.desc: When a woman's body is discovered at an Anaheim trash facility, a dedicated detective makes a promise to her mother to get justice. She doesn't know that search will bring her face to face with a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Trust
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead in his home and following the investigation, the case went cold. Years later, a woman and an ex-football player were arrested for the murder.

programme.title: Dateline: The Shadow
programme.desc: A young Iowa man is shot dead in his bed in the middle of the night, asleep next to his fiancée. Bizarre coincidences and quick thinking lead to a surprising answer about who wanted him dead and why.

programme.title: Dateline Extra: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: A beautiful, popular graduate student is shot dead outside her apartment in Durham, North Carolina. We take a look at who would want her dead and why.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ophelia the Octopus
programme.desc: Two rescued sea lions arrive at the aquarium, and trainers help prepare them for an upcoming eye surgery. The team travels to the Bahamas to research the effects of plastics in the ocean on sharks. The aquarium conducts a study to help wild beluga whales.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Toddler Sea Lion Scarlett
programme.desc: A southern sea otter is rushed to the health center. The team travels to Key Largo to help coral restoration efforts. Young African penguins prepare for an upcoming event. Love is in the air for a trainer and his favorite sea lion pup, Scarlett.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Slimy Is the New Fuzzy
programme.desc: The Georgia Aquarium sends a team to Cape Town, South Africa to help rehabilitate and release a group of African penguins into the wild. A dive team installs a shipwreck feature into the Ocean Voyager exhibit to provide an enrichment for their sea turtle.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Otter Tale
programme.desc: Beloved Asian small-clawed otter Pinkie has a recurring bloody nose, and the team goes to great lengths to find out what could be causing it. Feisty baby American alligators arrive at the aquarium and must learn to eat in an orderly way.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Sneak Peak
programme.desc: Dr. Diarra Blue, Dr. Aubrey Ross and Dr. Michael Lavigne are back and busier than ever in a new season.

programme.title: The Aquarium: A Deeper Dive: Stud Puffin
programme.desc: It's check-up time with the vet for bottlenose dolphin Polka and a pair of wobbegong sharks called Larry and Curly. Love is in the air as puffin season commences and an inquisitive box turtle takes a leisurely stroll.

programme.title: The Aquarium: A Deeper Dive: Seal of Approval
programme.desc: Scarlett the baby sea lion learns to keep up with her pod while blacktip reef shark L2 struggles to eat. An adorable beluga gets help from the staff in order to be weighed and sea jellyfish meet the public for the first time.

programme.title: The Aquarium: A Deeper Dive: Forever My Penguin
programme.desc: African penguins Charlie and Lizzy's 25-year love story is marred by Charlie's eye problem. A staff member lends a hand to rehabilitate elephant seals at the Marine Mammal Centre in California and a piranha is prepped for surgery.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Meet the Babies
programme.desc: At Georgia Aquarium, every birth, egg laid or hatched is very special to its staff. These meaningful experiences enrich the lives of the team who care for these animals and the guests who visit each day to learn and be inspired.

programme.title: The Aquarium: A Deeper Dive: Seal of Approval

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ready for the Jelly
programme.desc: A sweet beluga whale trains with staff to go on the 'whale scale.' Blacktip reef shark L2 is not eating normally and staff work to figure out why. See the first sea lion born at the aquarium.

programme.desc: A trio of new penguin chicks are introduced to the pool for their first swim. Family dynamics change when the mandrill monkey troop welcomes a new baby. Plus, a pair of king vultures are prepped for their big debut at the Queens Zoo.

programme.desc: Zoo staff face unexpected setbacks weaning a bright sea lion pup off her mother's milk. The bird team steps in to support a rejected curassow chick. And, a squirrel monkey pays a visit to the dentist.

programme.title: The Greatest: Mascots
programme.desc: In college football, mascots are an unlikely piece of serious business. These are the top 11 live animals, cartoon creations, and everything in between, in a fun breakdown of one of the sport's most enjoyable traditions.

programme.title: The Greatest: Inspiring Moments
programme.desc: If the best parts of sports are how they can inspire people, college football has enjoyed a wealth of unforgettable moments that fans will cherish forever. These are the top 11 of those highlights, on the field and off.

programme.title: The Greatest: Innovations
programme.desc: College football has continually evolved and innovated in ways that have made the game safer, more entertaining, and more exciting. These are the top 11 innovations that have impacted the sport's history.

programme.title: The Greatest: Walk-Ons
programme.desc: There's a difference, it turns out, between impossible and improbable. In college football's long history, there have been a handful of incredible stories of walk-ons who became stars. These are the top 11 of all time.

programme.title: The Greatest: Voices
programme.desc: As college football has played out, the voices who've told the stories have become an indelible part of the tale themselves. These are the top 11 of those voices – at the typewriter, at the microphone and in front of the camera.

programme.title: The Greatest: Uniforms
programme.desc: In college football, uniforms are at the core of a team's identity and its pride. These are the top 11 colors, combinations, and flourishes of all time on uniforms, helmets, and more, all across the country.

programme.title: The Greatest: Rivalry Games
programme.desc: Every season, college football rivals face off, and the intensity and passion are at a fever pitch. Some clashes have resulted in unforgettable games. These are the top 11 of those quintessential, classic gridiron battles.

programme.title: The Greatest: Upsets
programme.desc: College football has always been a game of Davids and Goliaths. Some of the most indelible results have been the ones that were least expected. These are the top 11 upsets, and the stories behind them.

programme.title: Movie: Seven Days in Utopia
programme.desc: After a disastrous debut on the pro circuit, a young golfer finds himself unexpectedly stranded in Utopia, Texas where an eccentric rancher teaches him about life and love.

programme.title: Movie: Tin Cup
programme.desc: An ex-golf pro attempts to impress his rival's girlfriend by competing in the U.S. Open.

programme.title: Feherty: Fred Couples: Boom Boom
programme.desc: David Feherty travels to Cabo San Lucas, Mexico to sit down with Fred Couples as the hall of famer discusses his life and career. Fred discusses his win at the 1992 Masters, his time ranked as the top golfer in the world and his nonchalant approach.

programme.title: Feherty: Fred Couples: King of Cool
programme.desc: Picturesque Cabo San Lucas, Mexico is the setting for the second half of David Feherty’s discussion with former World Number One golfer, Fred Couples. Fred discusses heartbreaks at the Ryder Cup, his domination of the silly season and the Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Feherty: Bryson DeChambeau
programme.desc: In Feherty’s hometown of Dallas, Texas, he meets up with analytical marvel Bryson DeChambeau where they delve into his love of science and how he applies it to the game.

programme.title: Feherty: Tony Finau
programme.desc: Feherty braves Utah’s winter cold to talk fire dancing, Ryder Cup and ugly ankle sprains with the PGA Tour’s Samoan sensation, Tony Finau.

programme.title: Feherty: Carson Daly
programme.desc: Carson Daly talks about his days growing up as a caddie at Riviera and his hopes of pursuing a life in golf, as well as a television career that has taken him from MTV star to his current positions on 'The Today Show' and 'The Voice.'

programme.title: Feherty: Kevin Hart
programme.desc: Comedian Kevin Hart joins David Feherty for a few rounds of conversation and sparring in the boxing ring. Kevin reveals his journey from struggling comic to A-list actor and explains his current emphasis on business.

programme.title: Feherty: Samuel L. Jackson
programme.desc: Feherty travels to New Orleans to chat with Samuel L. Jackson on his day off from Quentin Tarantino's new film 'Django Unchained.'

programme.title: Feherty: Jack Nicklaus
programme.desc: David Feherty visits with golf's Golden Bear, Jack Nicklaus, from his home in West Palm Beach, FL. Nicklaus reflects upon his record 18 major championships, conversations with his idol Bobby Jones and rivalries with Palmer, Watson, and Trevino.

programme.title: Feherty: Justin Thomas
programme.desc: Justin Thomas talks about his win at the PGA Championship, his great rounds at the Sony Open and U.S. Open, his relationship with Jordan Spieth and the young golfers coming up on the PGA tour.

programme.title: Feherty: Xander Schauffele
programme.desc: Feherty meets up with the man whose name keeps golf commentators up at night, Xander Schauffele. He travels to San Diego to discuss Xander's relationship with his father and swing coach, his first impressions of major championship golf and more.

programme.desc: The '90s holiday season began with cheer as Soviet leader Mikhail Gorbachev resigned on Christmas Day. Desktop computers, Tickle Me Elmo and the latest Beanie Baby toys were on everyone's Christmas list.

programme.title: The Men Who Built America: A New War Begins
programme.desc: Out of the turmoil of the Civil War, America enters an age of enlightenment that will change the landscape of the country forever. The growth is driven by five insightful men who will change the world.

programme.title: The Men Who Built America: Bloody Battles
programme.desc: As it recovers from the Civil War, America undertakes the largest building phase of the country's history. While much of the growth is driven by railroads and oil, it's built using steel.

programme.title: The Men Who Built America: Changing the Game
programme.desc: The steel and oil barons have forever changed the face of America, but they are just the beginning. JP Morgan arrives on the scene and expedites growth through finance.

programme.title: Movie: It Happened on Fifth Avenue
programme.desc: While a family is away for Christmas, a hobo and his friends live in their mansion.

programme.title: Movie: Holiday Affair
programme.desc: When a war widow cannot afford to buy a model train set that her son wants for Christmas, a financially strapped man offers to buy it for the boy.

programme.title: Movie: The Bishop's Wife
programme.desc: An angel comes to Earth to help a bishop and his wife raise funds to build a new church.

programme.title: Movie: Meet Me in St. Louis
programme.desc: A man's family members oppose moving from turn-of-the-century St. Louis to New York. Young love and childish fears highlight a year in their life.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Ebenezer Scrooge learns a lesson in charity after a visit from three spirits.

programme.title: Movie: Meet John Doe
programme.desc: A reporter who is being laid off ends her last column with a suicide letter from a fictional John Doe.

programme.title: Movie: All Mine to Give
programme.desc: A brother must find homes for his five orphaned siblings on Christmas Day.

programme.title: Movie: The Great Rupert
programme.desc: A man is suspected of being a thief after he finds a large sum of money in his home.

programme.title: Movie: March of the Wooden Soldiers
programme.desc: Two toymaker apprentices attempt to raise rent money for Widow Peep and Little Bo Peep.

programme.title: Movie: Tenth Avenue Angel
programme.desc: A child of the tenements helps an ex-con find a new life.

programme.title: Movie: Little Women
programme.desc: Follow the trials and tribulations of four sisters growing up during the Civil War.

programme.title: Movie: O.Henry's Full House
programme.desc: Five directors pay homage to O.Henry with five of his best short stories.

programme.title: Movie: Love Finds Andy Hardy
programme.desc: A young teenager is caught between three romances and he does not know which one to pick.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Joy-to-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv invites her 'Voltage' director and crew over for the Rooney's traditional Christmas Eve dinner but is forced to enlist Artie's help to prepare the famed meal. Meanwhile, Maddie and Willow's gift exchange takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Cali Christmas-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Maddie is upset that she can’t be in Wisconsin for Christmas and to cheer her up, Liv plans an incredible surprise. Meanwhile, Joey participates in a Mr. North Pole Santa Claus pageant against an old foe.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Secret Santa
programme.desc: Ravi's advice to Emma and Lou on their CIT gift exchange doesn't go as imagined. Meanwhile, Skai, Xander, Jorge and Tiffany run into a disgruntled man they are convinced is Santa and must work together to save Christmas.

programme.title: Bunk'd: How the Griff Stole Christmas
programme.desc: The campers participate in a gift-making activity for the upcoming holiday and Griff is not into it. Ravi and Lou try to create a special memory for Griff, while Santa asks Jorge to babysit for one of his reindeer.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Summer Winter Wonderland
programme.desc: When the temperature drops, Lou deems it 'Christmas in July!' Gwen reveals she doesn't understand Christmas traditions, so Lou shows her what real Christmas spirit is all about.

programme.title: Jessie: Jessie's Aloha Holidays With Parker and Joey
programme.desc: Parker and Joey, Jessie and the Ross kids decide to plan a tropical Christmas at the family's Hawaiian villa. Jessie reunites with old friend and superstar, Shayelee Michaels.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: It's Christmas, Gabby Duran
programme.desc: Olivia and Gabby are excited to see their dad for the holidays, but when a snowstorm ruins those plans, Gabby enlists Swift's shapeshifting ability to create a substitute dad.

programme.title: Disney Channel Holiday Party at Walt Disney World
programme.desc: Celebrities help celebrate the holidays and offer sneak peeks from Disney parks as well as the 'Zombies 2' movie sequel. A variety of musical performances will be featured from both Walt Disney World Resort and the majestic Disney Fantasy cruise ship.

programme.title: Disney Channel Special: Holidays Unwrapped
programme.desc: Raven Symone hosts a spectacular holiday special filled with many guests and fun performances, including the premiere of a music video for 'Descendants 3'.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: How the Syd Stole Christmas
programme.desc: After steering clear of the holidays due to her mother's passing, Syd finds a new fondness for Christmas.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Merry Christmas Mr. Gooch
programme.desc: When the radio station owner unexpectedly comes to town and fires Byron, Blair and Owen try to get him to change his mind.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Bah Humbugged
programme.desc: The Baxter-Carter-Grayson clan is in the holiday spirit, but Booker and Nia are at odds over new versus old family traditions. Raven and Garrett butt heads in the kitchen.

programme.title: K.C. Undercover: Twas the Fight Before Christmas
programme.desc: When K.C. gives her dad the perfect Christmas gift, she is the one who is surprised when she learns Craig and her Poppa Earl don't really get along and he has no idea they are all spies.

programme.title: K.C. Undercover: Holly Holly Not So Jolly
programme.desc: As the Cooper family decorates the house for the holidays, K.C. begins to reflect on the many disguises and missions she has taken on as a spy in hopes she can get over her holiday blues and recapture the spirit of the season.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Green Christmas
programme.desc: Cricket becomes worried that he's not on Santa's 'Nice List' so he goes on a spree of good deeds. Gramma and Nancy go on a last minute search for Bill's gift.

programme.desc: When Bob asks Bingo and Rolly to protect a snowman he’s building, the pugs make it their mission to keep their new snowy friend as cool as possible.

programme.desc: Spookley the Square Pumpkin comes across three stray kittens while trying to find a home during a winter storm.

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a magical baby reindeer the joy of Christmas giving! When Pip and Freddy accidentally shave a baby sheep's wool, they have to fix it before she is delivered.

programme.desc: Two school kids transform into crime-fighting superheroes to save Paris.

programme.desc: Paige and Frankie enlist their friends to help create a Holiday Video Sketchtacular special.

programme.desc: Trish is organizing a Kids Club holiday party at which Austin and Ally will perform their original holiday song and distribute Austin Moon dolls, but a mix-up at the factory leads to a scramble.

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives
programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today
programme.desc: The day's major public affairs and political events presented without interruption.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: U.S. House of Representatives
programme.desc: Floor proceedings of the U.S. House of Representatives.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: A gang from El Salvador infiltrates Chicago and Intelligence works with a visiting detective to put an end to the crew's brutal tactics. Antonio finds himself getting close to the Salvadorian detective Marcella Gomez but learns she has a hidden motive.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Anthem
programme.desc: A basketball star is murdered after an anti-police rally and Intelligence navigates a politically charged environment to track the killer. Woods' daughter Brianna gets tangled up in the case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sisterhood
programme.desc: Intelligence tracks a vigilante killing rapists. The investigation hits home for Burgess who begins to question if the men who attacked her sister truly paid for their actions.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Profiles
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a series of bombings targeting members of the media and enlists Firehouse 51 to help examine the devices and prevent the next attack.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Breaking Point
programme.desc: When a prominent Alderman known for urban revitalization efforts is killed, Intelligence looks into corruption in the neighborhood. Olinsky feels pressure after receiving an ultimatum from Woods.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Ghosts
programme.desc: Upton uses an old undercover identity to help take down a meth ring spearheaded by a former criminal contact. With pressure from Woods mounting, Voight calls in a favor from Olinsky.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Payback
programme.desc: A string of stash house robberies lead back to an unlikely individual. Voight confronts a key witness in the Bingham investigation.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Saved
programme.desc: Voight witnesses the kidnapping of a young woman with a mysterious connection to his past. Intelligence works to find a connection between her kidnapping and several bank robberies. Ruzek gets a tip that a grand jury has been summoned.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Allegiance
programme.desc: Halstead and Atwater go undercover to prevent military-grade weapons from hitting the street. Voight calls in a favor as a last-ditch effort to clear Olinsky's name for Bingham's murder.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Homecoming
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Intelligence seeks justice for Olinsky after he's stabbed in prison. Antonio's loyalty is tested when Woods looks to take down Voight once and for all.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Unwritten Rule
programme.desc: Analyst Nell Jones joins the NCIS: LA team in the field when a former Navy officer’s girlfriend is kidnapped in exchange for Navy intelligence.

programme.title: Dateline: Twisted Tale
programme.desc: When Denise Huskins reappeared just two days after her boyfriend reported she was abducted, police accused the couple of perpetrating a hoax. But another, similar crime caused authorities to re-examine the case.

programme.title: Snapped: Rebecca Bryan
programme.desc: A suspicious shooting reveals a pretty real estate agent’s scandalous secret life.

programme.title: Snapped: Kalila Taylor
programme.desc: The brutal murder of a homecoming queen shocks a NY town.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Silent Night, Lethal Night
programme.desc: When a mother and her two daughters fail to show up for Christmas dinner, officers enter their home and discover all three have been shot to death. The search for their killer reveals an unthinkable family nightmare.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: A Christmas Massacre
programme.desc: The Ortega family’s annual Christmas Eve party is destroyed when a man dressed as Santa, wielding handguns and a homemade flame-thrower, opens fire. Detectives are led down a terrifying path that leads them to a sociopath.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Carnage in Carnation
programme.desc: The holiday season screeches to a halt when six members of the Anderson family are discovered to have been gunned down in their home. Detectives work closely with family friends to track down the shocking murderer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Holiday Terror
programme.desc: As the holidays begin, fire fighters respond to a house fire and make a gruesome discovery. Three people have been shot dead inside. A nationwide manhunt takes authorities through Christmas, as they pursue the heavily armed murderer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Rampage
programme.desc: Two days after Christmas a mass shooting terrorizes a small town. After killing two people and wounding many more the gunman is taken into custody. When police search for answers they uncover the worst family massacre in US history.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Mourning
programme.desc: As the holidays begin, fire fighters respond to a house fire and make a gruesome discovery. Three people have been shot dead inside. A nationwide manhunt takes authorities through Christmas, as they pursue the heavily armed murderer.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: A Christmas Morning Murder
programme.desc: A holiday is ruined when a couple is murdered during what looks like a brutal home invasion. Police learn the true motive for the double homicide is a shocking tale of lies and betrayal.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Last Christmas
programme.desc: Just after Christmas, a young couple is found murdered inside their Florida home. Neighbors can't imagine the couple had been in the area long enough to make a mortal enemy. Police uncover deeply personal details, and soon expose a deadly secret.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Christmas Heartbreak
programme.desc: A beloved couple is found murdered inside their home on Christmas morning. All that's left behind is a single palm print. Investigators work tirelessly to match the print to a suspect, until a letter from prison takes the case on an unexpected course.

programme.title: Snapped: Michelle Byrom
programme.desc: A shooting has investigators asking was it the work of a rebellious son, an abused wife or something far more sinister.

programme.title: The Simpsons: My Big Fat Geek Wedding
programme.desc: When Skinner gets cold feet before his pending nuptials, Edna calls off the wedding.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Catch 'Em If You Can
programme.desc: When Homer and Marge escape for a romantic getaway, Bart and Lisa try to follow them.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simple Simpson
programme.desc: Homer becomes a masked avenger after he throws a pie in a cheater's face.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Way We Weren't
programme.desc: Homer recounts the story of his first smooch at summer camp with an anonymous girl.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart-Mangled Banner
programme.desc: When Bart accidentally moons the American flag, the Simpsons are labelled as unpatriotic.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fraudcast News
programme.desc: After Mr. Burns is reported dead, the newspapers write scathing articles about him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XV
programme.desc: Ned can see the future; Mr. Burns' body is explored; Lisa becomes a new Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: The Simpsons: All's Fair in Oven War
programme.desc: After Homer suddenly develops a knack for cooking, he unwittingly competes against Marge.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Sleeping With the Enemy
programme.desc: Discovering that Nelson has no parental figure, Marge invites him to live with them.

programme.title: The Simpsons: She Used to Be My Girl
programme.desc: Marge runs into her former high school pal Chloe Talbot who is now a famous newscaster.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fat Man and Little Boy
programme.desc: Bart becomes a t-shirt mogul after catching the attention of a gag gift entrepreneur.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Midnight Rx
programme.desc: Homer, Grampa, Apu and Flanders travel to Canada to buy drugs with fake health care cards.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mommie Beerest
programme.desc: When Moe's is shut down for health violations, Homer refinances his house to save the bar.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer and Ned's Hail Mary Pass
programme.desc: Homer inadvertently stumbles across a new career as a 'victory dance' choreographer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pranksta Rap
programme.desc: Bart sneaks out to a 50 Cent concert and fakes his own kidnapping to get out of trouble.

programme.title: The Simpsons: There's Something About Marrying
programme.desc: To boost tourism, the residents of Springfield decide to legalize same-sex marriage.

programme.title: The Simpsons: On a Clear Day I Can't See My Sister
programme.desc: Finally fed up with Bart's endless taunting, Lisa files a restraining order against Bart.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Goo Goo Gai Pan
programme.desc: Selma realizes that she missed her chance to have a baby and decides to adopt a baby girl.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mobile Homer
programme.desc: After Homer has an accident, Marge is pressured into buying life insurance for the family.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Seven Beer Snitch
programme.desc: Marge convinces the Springfield townspeople to fund a Frank Gehry-designed concert hall.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Future-Drama
programme.desc: An astrology machine gives Bart and Lisa a peek into their final days of high school.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Don't Fear the Roofer
programme.desc: Homer undergoes psychiatric treatment when no one believes his friend, Ray, exists.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Heartbroke Kid
programme.desc: Bart's diet of processed foods leads to a massive weight gain and health issues.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Star Is Torn
programme.desc: Lisa agrees to participate in a Krusty-sponsored Li'l Starmaker competition.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Thank God It's Doomsday
programme.desc: A religious movie and subsequent coincidences convince Homer that the Rapture is nigh, and the folks of Springfield, God love 'em, take him at his word.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Home Away From Homer
programme.desc: Flanders moves after Homer humiliates him, but neither man is pleased with his new neighbors. Jason Bateman has a cameo.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Father, Son and Holy Guest Star
programme.desc: Liam Neeson voices a priest who counsels Bart, and later Homer, who embrace the faith when an expelled Bart attends a Catholic school.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Bonfire of the Manatees
programme.desc: Marge is outraged to find Homer let Fat Tony shoot a 'gentlemen's' film in their house.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Girl Who Slept Too Little
programme.desc: Lisa suffers sleepless nights when a cemetery is moved to the Simpsons' neighbouring lot.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Milhouse of Sand and Fog
programme.desc: Homer capitalizes on Maggie's chicken pox by throwing a pox party and charging parents to infect their children. Meanwhile Milhouse realizes he was better off when his parents competed for his love.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVI
programme.desc: Mr. Burns invites Homer and his friends to his big estate for a hunting tournament, but Homer and the gang learn they are the ones being hunted. The Simpsons adopt David, an artificial robot son, after Bart falls into a coma.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge's Son Poisoning
programme.desc: Observing that Marge is lonely, Bart offers to spend time with her. After they go on tandem bike rides and decorate Bart's treehouse, the bullies from school dub Bart a mama's boy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: See Homer Run
programme.desc: Homer's inability to embrace Lisa's Father's Day book the same way he does Bart's Father's Day Toolman causes Lisa to develop DDD (Disappointed Daughter Disorder). In the meantime, Bart causes a huge car pile-up when he steals a street sign.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last of the Red Hat Mamas
programme.desc: Homer has an altercation with the Easter Bunny at the mayor's egg hunt, causing Marge to be shunned. Marge decides to join a woman's group called The Cheery Red Tomatoes, and agrees to help with an upcoming charity drive.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Italian Bob
programme.desc: After Mr. Burns crashes his Stutz Bearcat, he sends Homer and the family off to Italy to pick up his new fancy sports car. While on their adventure, the Simpsons end up stranded in a village where a rehabilitated Sideshow Bob reigns as mayor.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Simpsons Christmas Stories
programme.desc: The Simpsons deliver holiday cheer in this Christmas-themed trilogy. Homer takes over the sermon and delivers his version of the birth of Christ. Grandpa reminisces about his daredevil days as a fighter pilot. The townspeople prepare for Christmas Day.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Paternity Coot
programme.desc: Marge's rage against the new toll road system somehow leads to the discovery of a frozen mailman and his 40-year-old mail. The letters are returned to the rightful recipients.

programme.title: The Simpsons: We're on the Road to D'Ohwhere
programme.desc: After Bart steals a key from Principal Skinner's office and gets himself into hot water, Marge and Homer send him to a behaviour modification camp.

programme.title: The Simpsons: My Fair Laddy
programme.desc: The Simpsons take in Groundskeeper Willy after Bart accidentally destroys his house. But soon after his arrival, Willy's poor manners become the focus of a bet between Bart and Lisa, as she takes on the challenge of turning him into a proper gentleman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Seemingly Never-Ending Story
programme.desc: While cave exploring with his family, Homer causes the cave to crumble and finds himself stuck upside down in the ceiling. Marge and Bart search for help, while Lisa passes the time by telling Homer a story, which turns into a chain of narrated tales.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Has Two Mommies
programme.desc: When Ned Flanders wins a new computer, he offers it to Marge because he has no use for it. In return, Marge babysits the Flanders children so that Ned can attend the Left-Handed Convention, where he meets Randy Johnson of the New York Yankees.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Simpson, This Is Your Wife
programme.desc: Homer's obsession with Lenny's new plasma TV prompts Marge to enter the family in a sweepstakes, and they win a trip to the Fox Studio Lot. Against Marge's wishes, Homer signs them up for a Trading Spouses-type show.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Million Dollar Abie
programme.desc: Abe ruins Homer's plans to make Springfield the new home of a pro football franchise when he mistakes the Commissioner of Football for a burglar. After the football stadium is transformed into a bull-fighting arena, Abe seeks help to commit suicide.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Kiss Kiss Bang Bangalore
programme.desc: Homer learns that the nuclear power plant is being shut down and outsourced to India. After Homer is sent to train the new employees, he becomes power hungry in his new position of authority.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Wettest Stories Ever Told
programme.desc: When the Simpsons' plans for a family outing at the Frying Dutchman turn into a dining disaster, they try to salvage the night by telling different stories of disasters at sea. Lisa recounts the Mayflower voyage, and Bart tells tales of Tahitian mutiny.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girls Just Want to Have Sums
programme.desc: Springfield is in an uproar after Principal Skinner makes a sexist comment at the end of an Itchy and Scratchy musical. Principal Skinner is replaced by Melanie Upfoot, a women's education expert, who divides the school into two different schools.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Regarding Margie
programme.desc: After a spring-cleaning frenzy and inhaling too many fumes, Marge suffers from retrograde amnesia. In an effort to bring back her memory, Homer takes her around town to re-familiarize her with her surroundings.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Monkey Suit
programme.desc: After visiting an evolution exhibit, Flanders pushes Mayor Quimby to appoint Reverend Lovejoy as a 'Morality Czar' in charge of spreading the theory of creationism. Darwin's theories are outlawed and Lisa is the only supporter of the theory.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Army of Ghosts
programme.desc: The human race rejoices as the ghosts of loved ones return home. But as the Doctor, Rose and Jackie investigate the Torchwood Tower, the whole of modern-day Earth threatens to fall.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Doomsday
programme.desc: It's the end of an epic journey as two mighty armies wage war across the Earth, with the human race caught in the middle. But as an unstoppable terror emerges from beneath Torchwood, the Doctor faces an even greater dilemma.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Christmas Invasion
programme.desc: The Tardis falls to Earth on Christmas Eve, bringing the new Doctor home to Rose's family. But while his regeneration goes wrong, Santa-shaped assassins and deadly Christmas trees herald the approach of the Sycorax.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Runaway Bride
programme.desc: Bride-to-be Donna mysteriously vanishes as she prepares to marry her boyfriend Lance. She suddenly appears, to her complete astonishment, in the Tardis with the Doctor.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Voyage of the Damned
programme.desc: The TARDIS collides with a spacecraft replica of the Titanic and the Doctor must make a stand against a race of android angels.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Next Doctor
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve in 1851 and Cybermen stalk the snow of Victorian London. When the Doctor arrives and starts to investigate a spate of mysterious deaths, he's surprised to meet another Doctor, with his own sonic screwdriver and cockney assistant.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The End of Time
programme.desc: It's the Tenth Doctor's final journey and his psychotic nemesis the Master has been reborn, on Christmas Eve. The Doctor faces the end of his life as the Master's plans hurtle out of control.

programme.title: Doctor Who: New Earth
programme.desc: The Doctor and Rose board the Tardis for new adventures in time and space. But when they visit mankind's new home in the future, they find gruesome secrets hidden inside a luxury hospital. Meanwhile, Cassandra is out for revenge.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Tooth and Claw
programme.desc: The Doctor and Rose have to protect Queen Victoria from the Empire of the Wolf.

programme.title: Doctor Who: School Reunion
programme.desc: The Doctor investigates a contemporary London school which is being haunted by strange, bat-like creatures at night. While at the school, he meets an old friend and Rose discovers the legacy of being a Time Lord's companion.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Girl in the Fireplace
programme.desc: Madame de Pompadour's dreams are being haunted by a stranger called the Doctor. When she finds the court of Versailles under attack from clockwork droids she tries to summon her mysterious Doctor to save the day.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Doctor Falls
programme.desc: The Doctor makes a final stand against an army of Cybermen, to protect a tiny band of humans from destruction.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Last Christmas

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Husbands of River Song

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Return of Doctor Mysterio
programme.desc: Nardole and the Doctor join forces with a masked hero known as 'The Ghost' to fend off brain-swapping aliens.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Twice Upon a Time
programme.desc: The magical final chapter of the twelfth Doctor's journey sees the Time Lord team up with his former self, the first ever Doctor, and a returning Bill Potts, for one last adventure.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Finding Nefertiti
programme.desc: Scientists have spent years looking for the mummy of Nefertiti, one of ancient Egypt's most iconic pharaohs. The latest tech helps experts in their search, what they discover might reveal the shocking truth about how she died, and Egypt’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Unearthed: When Rome Burned
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the truth behind the scandals and catastrophes that beset the Roman Empire during the reign of Nero, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts investigate who caused the Great Fire of Rome and how it rebuilt itself.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mystery of the Illuminati
programme.desc: The Illuminati are a top-secret group said to have unrivaled world power and control, and experts using cutting-edge tech to investigate the truth behind the legends of this international secret society.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: Unearthed: Nero's Lost Palace
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal the scandals and secrets of Nero and his lost palace. Using cutting-edge technology, experts may confirm if the infamous emperor burned down Rome so his could build his golden wonder.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Mystery of the Illuminati
programme.desc: The Illuminati are a top-secret group said to have unrivaled world power and control, and experts using cutting-edge tech to investigate the truth behind the legends of this international secret society.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of the Colosseum
programme.desc: New evidence uncovers the ancient mysteries behind the iconic Colosseum. Archaeologists uncover the secret lives of the gladiators and make new discoveries that help explain the rise and sudden fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: How It's Made: The Bike That Flies
programme.desc: The innovative flying water bike propels users 40 feet into the air allowing them to soar over water, and the process to make them takes the latest technology and expert engineering.

programme.title: How It's Made: World's Greatest Motorcycles
programme.desc: Cutting-edge, high-end motorcycles are some of the most advanced vehicles on the road, and the process to build them requires cutting-edge technology and expert engineering.

programme.title: How It's Made: Firefighter Mega Ladder

programme.title: How It's Made: Hammer of Fire
programme.desc: Handmade hammers forged from steel are essential tools for construction, and the process to make one requires cutting-edge technology expert engineering.

programme.title: How It's Made: Olympic Super Rifle
programme.desc: Air rifles are used by world-class sharpshooters in Olympic competition, and the process to make these complex machines require cutting-edge technology and expert engineering.
