programme.title: American Justice: A Model Murder
programme.desc: Police investigate a photographer when a model goes missing after a photo shoot.

programme.title: American Justice: What Happened to Carrie Culberson?
programme.desc: A cheerleader vanished from Blanchester in 1996 and her boyfriend was convicted of murder.

programme.title: Nightwatch: 105 and Rising
programme.desc: It's a hot and humid night in New Orleans, and as temperatures rise, violence erupts. Police chase two carjacking suspects. Keeley treats an injured young family. Titus and Dan respond to a call from a former Playboy bunny.

programme.title: Nightwatch: New Beginnings
programme.desc: The team celebrates the opening of its new headquarters, finally complete after 10 years of working out of trailers. The new team, Arcady and Ted, get to know each other's styles in their first shifts together.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Let's Play Pirate
programme.desc: When Nikki Orvin fell in love and married Damon Bamberg she had no idea what a twisted family she was now a part of. Soon after giving birth to Damon's son, Nikki realized that she was not the only woman in her husband's life.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Breakfast for a Dead Man
programme.desc: A likeable and hard working father is found murdered and questions are raised about his family.

programme.title: The Family That Slays Together: Rum Chaser/ Murder for Nothing
programme.desc: Darlene George and her 13-year-old son are the victims of a random home invasion robbery. But when police arrive, Darlene's husband, Winston George is found in the basement, hog-tied and strangled.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams debate infamous crimes and legal cases.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: When a young army vet is found stabbed to death on his living room floor, suspicions quickly fall to a neighbor who was arrested during a nearby altercation. But when Kenda takes a closer look at the victim's love life, he realizes someone's been lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Make My Day
programme.desc: When Keith Andrews is killed, a man steps forward claiming he did it in self-defense-but Lt. Joe Kenda has his doubts. Then... Civil rights icon Gretchen McRae is found decomposing in her house. And that's not even the biggest secret on the premises.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Shoelace Killer
programme.desc: A teenage party at the edge of the city turns horrific after the discovery of a woman's corpse. Detectives easily surmise that she was strangled with her own shoelace, but figuring out her identity proves difficult.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Body in the Freezer
programme.desc: A meeting between two businessmen leaves one shot in the face. Things seem cut and dry until Lt. Kenda realizes the 'victim' could actually be the aggressor, shot struggling over his own gun. The key to the case lies in the deal they were discussing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis' life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs looking for clues but the biggest revelation comes from the poison itself.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Cradle to the Grave
programme.desc: When a frantic 9-1-1 call reports an infant stopped breathing, Kenda and Walker must see if the daycare is to blame or the parents themselves. Then, Kenda works an execution-style shooting and is shocked to learn the victim is a kindly grandmother.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Primal Instinct
programme.desc: When a drunken dispute at a biker bar turns deadly, Kenda must launch a manhunt for a pair of suspects who fled with a small boy in tow. Then a man is murdered in an onslaught of high caliber gunfire, but an unexpected break turns the case on its head.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Cage
programme.desc: Kenda finds the bullet-ridden bodies of a middle-aged couple in a musty suburban house alongside the corpses of their two beloved pets. But the case is stuck in neutral until detectives discover an essential clue hidden behind an old wire birdcage.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Lt. Joe Kenda and his team investigate the scene of an apparent suicide, only to be forced to flee when they discover the house is booby-trapped. Then Kenda is nearly stumped when a group of teens discover human bones on the outskirts of town.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: George Ferribee, a loving son led astray by addiction, is found executed. When Lt. Joe Kenda learns the victim had recently been kidnapped, he assumes the crimes are related... but soon discovers things are much more complicated than he had expected.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Joker In the Pack
programme.desc: Events earlier in the day lead to a card game halted by gunfire and a young man's death. Also, when Lt. Joe Kenda responds to a double shooting, he and his team find themselves reminiscing.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using just a mere shred of evidence and his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Dead on Target
programme.desc: A young father-to-be is shot dead in broad daylight by a single bullet fired from afar. At the crime scene, Kenda recognizes the hallmark of a skilled sniper. But with zero evidence at his disposal, he'll rely on shoe leather detective work.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Night Terrors
programme.desc: When Cheryl Brantner's children find her dead in her bathtub, Lt. Joe Kenda must decide if this was a soapy accident or something worse. Then, a gathering of local tattoo artists turns ugly, leaving Philip Titus dead and the only suspects his peers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Blood From a Stone
programme.desc: A bystander receives a deadly head injury during a roadside altercation, but the stakes are raised when his body disappears from the scene. Then when a toddler is kidnapped for ransom, Kenda joins forces with an undercover team in a race against time.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Bullet With My Name on It
programme.desc: In his first year on the force, rookie patrol officer Joe Kenda quickly learns the ropes. But when he tries to singlehandedly stop a brawling mob, he finds himself facing down gunfire. Can Kenda help detectives catch the man who nearly killed him?

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Murder Haunts Me
programme.desc: A young mother-to-be is shot and left for dead. To catch her assailant, Kenda must elicit a death-bed confession from the victim herself. Then...a corpse found floating in Monument Creek leads Kenda to a mysterious encampment on a nearby riverbank.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: We Kill the Ones We Love
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves Van Terry dead; to crack the case, Lt. Joe Kenda must put his faith... in a burglar. Then...Cherie Bradley and her ex-boyfriend Anthony Carroll are found dead, and it's up to Kenda to discover which of their relatives did it.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Worst I've Ever Seen
programme.desc: Two grandparents are shot to death in their family home. Kenda's investigation kicks into high gear when his prime suspect flees for the Mexican border. Then...CSPD responders find a body so badly mutilated it turns the stomachs of seasoned officers.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Written in Blood
programme.desc: A community is shocked when Antoine McKenzie is brazenly shot outside an auto parts store in broad daylight. But when no witnesses can identify the killer, the only lead left for Lt. Joe Kenda is a final message written in the victim's own blood.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Outlaw
programme.desc: When a gunfight erupts at a local biker bar and claims the lives of two men, Lt. Joe Kenda must delve deep into the world of an infamous biker gang to determine if the cause behind the violent encounter was gang rivalry or something more personal.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Door No. 12
programme.desc: Neighbors are stunned when close friends Louis Matos and Colleen Johnson are gunned down in cold blood. The case kicks into high gear when Lt. Joe Kenda locates a panic-stricken eyewitness who played an unwitting role in the bloodbath.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Soft-spoken restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. With scant physical evidence, Lt. Joe Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he's ever faced.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: My Worst Fear
programme.desc: Police are shocked to find a 13-year-old boy killed in an explosion, but their grief turns to alarm when they discover a second, unexploded bomb. To catch the killer, Det. Joe Kenda must first figure out whom the bomb was meant for.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Maximum reach makes the Sniper Rifle an Ultimate Weapon. With the accuracy and stopping power to take out small targets a mile away, the military sniper can put demands on the weapon that will achieve amazing results.

programme.title: Ultimate Weapons: Heavy Metal
programme.desc: Observe the tanks and artillery that bring heavy firepower to bear on the enemy. These beasts of war have earned their place as Ultimate Weapons.

programme.title: Egypt's Greatest Mysteries: The Secrets of the Hieroglyphs
programme.desc: The story of how Champollion began to uncover the strange world described by the ancient Egyptian hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Egypt's Greatest Mysteries: The Pharaoh and the Showman
programme.desc: This is the story of how Giovanni Belzoni, an anglicised Italian circus performer, ended up in Egypt in 1814. At a time when it was just starting to open up to Europeans, Belzoni becomes its greatest explorer.

programme.title: Egypt's Greatest Mysteries: The Temple of the Sands
programme.desc: The story of how Belzoni made some of his greatest discoveries including the tomb of Seti I, the most beautiful in the Valley of the Kings, and the hidden entrance to the mysterious sand-covered temple of Ramesses at Abu Simbel.

programme.title: Egypt's Greatest Mysteries: The Curse of Tutankhamun
programme.desc: The story of the tomb. The prize that Howard Carter had sought all his life was to yield more than anyone could imagine. Thousands of pieces, crowned by the famous solid-gold coffin and solid-gold death mask.

programme.title: Egypt's Greatest Mysteries: The Mystery of the Rosetta Stone
programme.desc: The story of the race to decipher Ancient Egyptian hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Egypt's Greatest Mysteries: The Search for Tutankhamun
programme.desc: How British archaeologist Howard Carter discovered the tomb of Egyptian king, Tutankhamun.

programme.title: Egypt's Greatest Mysteries: The Curse of Tutankhamun
programme.desc: The story of the tomb. The prize that Howard Carter had sought all his life was to yield more than anyone could imagine. Thousands of pieces, crowned by the famous solid-gold coffin and solid-gold death mask.

programme.title: Egypt's Greatest Mysteries: The Search for Tutankhamun

programme.title: Egypt's Greatest Mysteries: The Secrets of the Hieroglyphs
programme.desc: The story of how Champollion began to uncover the strange world described by the ancient Egyptian hieroglyphs.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Part of the Texas Seven
programme.desc: Patrick Murphy and six other inmates pull off the largest escape in Texas history. They launch a statewide crime spree but up the ante when they kill a police officer. They hide in an RV Park but get recognized, prompting a showdown with authorities.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Send a Bomb in the Mail
programme.desc: Albert Paul is Maine's most notorious escape artist who's drawn to a life of crime. Shortly after making parole, he's arrested for murder and spends the next couple of decades pulling off daring prison breaks only to get captured after every attempt.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Bad Temper
programme.desc: In July, 2000 Aurlieas McClarty walks into a store and kills the manager for $200. Despite being a wanted man, McClarty doesn't keep a low profile. All McClarty wants is money, cars, drugs and women, and does anything to get them.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape From the Rock
programme.desc: In 1987, an ex-con prepares for his most daring crime yet; ambushing a prison transport van.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Get Revenge
programme.desc: Scott Eizember has a temper and a history of abuse. So when his girlfriend dumps him, Scott wants revenge. He goes on a violent spree, but is injured during his pursuit.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Go to Canada
programme.desc: Scott Freeburg has been in and out of prison his whole life. So when a drug deal goes wrong, he runs to Canada. But soon Scott is back in the gang life. And the Canadian police quickly ID him by his tattoos and extradite him back to the U.S.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Pose as a War Vet
programme.desc: Posing as a veteran and preying on women to get cash, cars, and even a house, Jerrod Durr finds himself in a multistate game of cat and mouse with cops.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught in the Shower
programme.desc: Richard Garber thinks he has gotten away with murder, after he bludgeons a neighbour to death. But when he becomes the lead suspect in the case, Garber hits the road spending eight months dodging the Feds and sneaking cash from his girlfriend.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Gun Made of Toilet Paper
programme.desc: Kerry Silvers was facing 55 years in the slammer for robbery and battery, so he decided to escape. Along with two other prisoners they overpowered a few guards and were able to calmly walk out of prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got That Tough Girl Look
programme.desc: Juanita Liebman and two friends plan to rob a man at Biketoberfest in FL, but it goes wrong and the three kick him into a coma. Juanita tries to lay low, but her epilepsy requires medical attention. The cops stake out the pharmacy to apprehend her.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Dixie Dog Den
programme.desc: The Cabin Masters team helps their own Matthew Dix restore his grandfather's old shed to its former glory.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: 130-Year-Old Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle the renovation of a 130-year-old cabin located on an island with a budget of $40,000 and a time frame of six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Building Hope
programme.desc: Ingrid was in the process of converting a small cottage into a modern home when she suffered an aneurysm and two strokes. Her daughter took over, but needs Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Log Jam
programme.desc: Mark hires a family friend to build a custom log house for him to retire in. The budget has been maxed out and the home isn’t done, so he sends out an SOS that Mike Holmes answers.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Flood Suckers
programme.desc: After a historic downpour in the City of Toronto, Gina’s basement floods with water from the city’s sewage system. Mike does double-duty as he tries to save this family’s home as well as the memories stored in an old workshop in the basement.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Urea Got Me
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house recently retrofitted with a substance that’s been banned in Canada for decades.

programme.desc: Mark hires a family friend to build a custom log house for him to retire in. The budget has been maxed out and the home isn’t done, so he sends out an SOS that Mike Holmes answers.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Pennsylvania Charm Meets California Pool House
programme.desc: The team at Heritage Salvage works hard to salvage as much as they can from their biggest brooder barn to date. Back at the shipyard, Bug comes up with a plan to use a hand-hewn beam from a Pennsylvania Amish barn.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: House Sandwich
programme.desc: Mike gets called to a house that’s flooding after two monster custom homes are built on either side. The homeowners want to blame the builders, but Mike reveals that the real solution lies closer to home.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: We're in Business
programme.desc: Mike and MJ decide to go into business together to buy houses and renovate them right. But MJ is in for a surprise when he discovers Mike has already purchased their first project, then finds another potential investment 3.5 hours away.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Water: The Good, the Bad and the Money
programme.desc: MJ and Mike get a good deal on a St. Lawrence River eyesore in the Thousand Islands but inherit a house full of asbestos and are forced to call in a remediation team.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Demo, Digging and Dancing
programme.desc: Mike and MJ add a partial second story to the country house while dangerous structural issues in the river house force them to take down the roof and second floor walls.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: What Comes Down Must Go Up
programme.desc: Facing major structural and water issues at the river house, Mike and MJ decide to take the whole house down so they can build it back up right. This is a major setback, and their profit will take a big hit unless they identify some areas to save.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions and Delays
programme.desc: Trusses go up at the river house until MJ learns that the permits for the new build have not yet been approved. Mike goes to the council meeting hoping to hear good news, but it's a waiting game in the meantime. Designer Sarah Richardson offers advice.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Debates, Decisions, Designer
programme.desc: The leaching bed is replaced at the country house, and work progresses until Mike and MJ find out an open permit remains on the barn. Later, the big day finally arrives when MJ and Lisa get married in a picturesque setting, as long as the rain holds off.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Here We Go Again
programme.desc: After MJ and Lisa's wedding, smooth sailing is wishful thinking as Mike and MJ are welcomed back to the river house by a river of muck. The deck posts and windows get installed as they rush to get the house closed in before the winter weather arrives.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Game Changer
programme.desc: Mike's vision for open concept at the suburban house hits a structural snag and MJ attempts to rein him in before the budget takes another hit. A fun surprise awaits the team at the river house, until Mike throws another curveball at MJ.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Beef and Beyond
programme.desc: Beef is king in Texas, and Roger Mooking visits two pitmasters who are elevating traditional smoked meats with exciting global flavours. In Pearland, Texas, he helps Ronnie Killen season and smoke brisket and beef ribs to serve at Killen's Barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoked Out
programme.desc: Where there's fire, there's smoke, and some of the most flavourful meat on the market.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is scouring the country for fiery fresh takes on the beloved classic combination, surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Raising the Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Lone Star State, where they're taking open-fire cooking to new culinary heights with unique rigs. In Fort Worth, Texas, chef and restaurateur Lou Lambert invites Roger to his ranch to slow-roast whole hogs over oak coals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Whole Animals
programme.desc: Roger's learning to rig up and roast whole animals with some truly wild techniques. First he'll learn an ancient Argentine method of roasting lamb upright over coals by hanging them on cast iron crosses in the open air.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Couples
programme.desc: From live-fire cooking to low-and-slow barbecue, Roger Mooking meets up with two couples making fiery feasts and creating sparks in California.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pizza
programme.desc: Roger Mooking presents the top fifteen pizza offerings in the whole country.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sausages, Franks and Dogs
programme.desc: In Sagaponack, N.Y., Michael Symon heads to a smokehouse where succulent, slow-smoked pork ribs are mopped with a tangy, citrus barbecue sauce. In Columbus, Ohio, there's a beefy burger topped with smoky kielbasa.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet Treats and Savory Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with triple-processed pork belly that's cured, brined and smoked to meaty perfection. In Seattle, tender braised lamb shoulder amps up a traditional breakfast hash.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smokehouse Reinventions
programme.desc: In Islip, N.Y., Michael Symon digs into a decadent, 17-layer smokehouse reinvention of lasagna with pork, brisket, bacon and mac and cheese. Then in Buffalo, a brewpub serves up the city's most famous export, buffalo chicken.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Supremely Smokey and Dizzyingly Delicious
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Savannah, where fried chicken and pancake tacos are a delicious reinvention of classic chicken and waffles. In Seattle, a burger with a house-made chorizo patty brings serious Spanish flavor to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Maui, Hi
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Hawaii, where he embraces the aloha spirit and takes on a whopping three-and-a-half-pound burger.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing trek across America brings him to Austin, TX. He starts with a 2-pound barbecue behemoth packed with every meat, sauce and side on the menu.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Burlington, VT
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to the small town of Burlington, Vermont, for some mammoth eats, including a beer-infused bagel feast and a 3.5-pound breakfast sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Diggy's Bolognese Crazy
programme.desc: Rev's son Diggy is a man on the move, but if there is one thing that keeps him coming home it's his craving for his favorite comfort food, chicken bolognese. Justin invites her sister, Aunt Chelle, to help her make more of Diggy's favorite recipes.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Old School Sunday
programme.desc: Rev's daughter Miley is full of youthful excitement, especially about having her Grandparents come to Sunday Supper. This inspires Rev to cook up some of his favorite childhood dishes.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Rockin' Rolls on a Sushi Sunday
programme.desc: Rev Run and Justine create a Japanese bounty, including classic miso soup, tangy chicken teriyaki, and a simple salad with an explosive carrot-ginger dressing.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Ravioli Revelations
programme.desc: Justine uses her latest culinary skills by making homemade ravioli in the hopes of impressing her sister Chelle.

programme.title: Rev Run's Sunday Suppers: Rev Run's Happy Holidays
programme.desc: The holidays at the Simmons' house means a week full of food and family.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Four Cakes In One
programme.desc: A set of identical Quadruplets get ready to celebrate their 27th birthday, but just because they look alike, doesn't mean they all want the same cake.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Snow In Dallas
programme.desc: Kirsten and Marcus are getting married in a few weeks, and are on the hunt for the perfect cake.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Dallas Dream Cake
programme.desc: Jay Michaels and Jay Roecker want a cake as chic and over-the-top as their personalities.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Carnival Dreams
programme.desc: Mike and Miranda have always shared a love of fun and are planning a carnival-themed wedding, an homage to their first date, but the cake design is still up in the air.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Ostriches, Tacos and Groundhogs, Oh My!
programme.desc: A flightless bird of epic proportions comes to life in Dallas while taco fillings are piled high on a giant confectionary shell. Next, it's an extraordinary Sweet 16 when the birthday girl's face is reimagined on a cake.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Cities, Skates and Jellyfish Cakes
programme.desc: A birthday girl is thrilled with an underwater creature cake that's taller than her, and a wedding cake combines two cities into one epic display. Then a baking team rolls out a sculpted bust that's ready for the rink.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Flying and Golden Cakes
programme.desc: Bakers make penguins fly on a snowy cake filled with special effects, and savory turns sweet when po' boys are made out of cake.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Leprechaun and Mermaid Cakes
programme.desc: A giant leprechaun cake completes a St. Patrick's Day party while one bride's floral fairytale becomes a reality with 2,600 edible homemade flowers. Plus, savory dishes that look like anything but cake are stacked extra high.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Fiery, Fairytale Cakes
programme.desc: A waterfront wedding cake gets its own functioning river and an island-themed cake erupts with Polynesian flair. Later, a fairytale Vegas wedding cake is taller than the bride.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Legendary, Adventure Cakes
programme.desc: A couple's honeymoon travels inspire an adventure-filled cake complete with dry ice, and a Texas music legend is celebrated with a unique Route 66 cake sculpted just for him.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Fancy Flower and Farm Cakes
programme.desc: A baker designs an epic pop culture wedding cake with a massive dragon, and customers in a coffee shop are pleasantly surprised by a sweet creation with an edible mug.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Luxurious and Playful Cakes
programme.desc: Luxurious details and elegant decor make for a most-extravagant wedding cake. Then zoo animals come to life, sugar looks like hand-blown glass, and a duck rides a mechanical bull on a super playful birthday cake.

programme.title: Movie: Holly Day

programme.desc: BET presents this celebration, featuring Jill Scott, Regina Hall, Terrence J, Yolanda Adams, Janelle Monae, Leslie Odom Jr., BBD, Michelle Williams, The Roots, De La Soul, Usher and Samuel L. Jackson.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Mom's the Word
programme.desc: Joan and Toni make unlikely connections while man hunting at a trendy singles bar.

programme.title: Girlfriends: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: Maya gets an expensive watch for Christmas from the wrong man; William plays Santa Claus.

programme.title: Girlfriends: I Have a Dream House
programme.desc: Joan lobbies her law firm to recognize Martin Luther King Jr. Day; William buys a house.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Sister, Sistah
programme.desc: Lynn's Caucasian sister gets playful by uttering an offensive racial epithet.

programme.title: Girlfriends: Willie or Won't He II, the Last Chapter?

programme.desc: Nanpire and Grandpop the Great celebrate the Blood Moon Festival; Demi casts a spell for a snow day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Snow-Go with the Flow / Happy Helpers on Ice!
programme.desc: Minnie's plans for everyone on a trip to the Swiss Alps are interrupted by the Kai family's first experience with snow!

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Masks Saves Christmas

programme.title: The Rocketeer: Downhill Derby/ Flight Class Heroes

programme.desc: A dog's remarkable journey to find a home. A distance of 6,455 miles doesn't begin to measure the journey one dog made to join a team and find a family.

programme.title: SportsCenter Featured: Miraculous: The Austin Hatch Story
programme.desc: Austin Hatch chases his dream of playing for the Michigan Wolverines.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Matt Millen: All Heart
programme.desc: The extraordinary story of NFL great Matt Millen's journey to an organ transplant.

programme.title: SportsCenter Featured: The Return
programme.desc: Rocky Bleier, was drafted and sent to Vietnam during his rookie with the Steelers. He was wounded in combat and told he would never play football again, but worked his way back earning four Super Bowl rings for the Steelers.

programme.title: Ken Burns' Baseball: 5th Inning
programme.desc: An acclaimed documentary of the history of baseball.

programme.title: Ken Burns' Baseball: 6th Inning
programme.desc: An acclaimed documentary of the history of baseball.

programme.title: Movie: Major League
programme.desc: A group of misfits are picked to form a baseball team that manages to surprise everyone.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: The Dynasty That Almost Was
programme.desc: Cleveland in the 1990s was an explosive offensive team that came close to greatness, but never captured a championship.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: Jim Leyland: A Life in Baseball
programme.desc: Bob Costas sits down with Jim Leyland about his more than five decades in baseball and his trademark hard-nosed managerial style, which led to 1,769 career wins and endeared him to every player he managed.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: The Swingin' A's
programme.desc: Explore the tense relationship between controversial owner Charlie Finley and the team's roster of superstars as the A's won back-to-back-to-back World Series titles from 1972-1974.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: The Impossible Dream: Red Sox Nation Begins
programme.desc: Long before David Ortiz and Manny, even before Fisk and Buckner, Red Sox Nation began with the impossible dream of 1967.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: The Bird
programme.desc: A documentary about eccentric Detroit Tigers rookie, Mark Fidrych, who captivated fans and teammates thanks to his unusual antics on the pitching mound.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: Holy Cow! The Story of Harry Caray
programme.desc: Hall of Fame broadcaster Harry Caray's rise to becoming one of baseball's most iconic voices and how his legacy still resonates throughout the game today.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: Billy
programme.desc: Award-winning actor John Turturro narrates an in-depth profile of the complicated, brilliant and combative manager Billy Martin.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: Mr. Padre
programme.desc: A documentary focusing on Hall of Famer, Tony Gwynn, and his amazing talents both on and off the field.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: Eck: A Story of Saving
programme.desc: Dennis Eckersley reveals in an in-depth interview how he faced the ups and downs during his pitching career, including family strife and a battle with alcoholism and his path to sobriety.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: Only in Hollywood
programme.desc: The story of the 1988 World Series Champion Los Angeles Dodgers narrated by award-winning actor Bryan Cranston.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: The 1995 Mariners, Saving Baseball in Seattle
programme.desc: As the Seattle Mariners entered its 19th season in 1995, the team was at a crossroads and there was a strong possibility the team would leave Seattle. Ken Griffey Jr., Randy Johnson and the 1995 Mariners helped reinvigorate baseball in the city.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: Bench
programme.desc: An in-depth and intimate look at Johnny Bench's Hall of Fame playing career and his life now as a father to two young sons. Narrated by award-winning actor, Martin Sheen.

programme.title: MLB Network Presents: The Cobra at Twilight
programme.desc: A look at controversial figure Dave Parker who was the first ballplayer to get a million dollar contract and also one of the most outspoken and feared players who now faces a battle with Parkinson's disease and its impact.

programme.title: Movie: The Babe
programme.desc: A biographical look at the career and troubled personal life of baseball legend Babe Ruth.

programme.title: Movie: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: Two sisters join the first female professional baseball league during the Second World War and struggle to help it succeed despite their growing sibling rivalry.

programme.title: Basketball
programme.desc: Basketball.

programme.title: Basketball Stories: A Decade to Remember
programme.desc: Some of the greatest NBA moments spanning across the 2010s. Experience the best of 10 years worth of Finals, 10 years worth of legendary retirements, 10 years worth of MVP moments, and 10 years worth of All-Star weekends and more.

programme.title: The Announcement
programme.desc: An in-depth look at Magic Johnson's shocking revelation that he had contracted the HIV virus, which he announced on November 7, 1991.

programme.title: The Doctor: Dr. J
programme.desc: The definitive look at Julius 'Dr. J' Erving's life and career - growing up in New York, playing in (and carrying) the ABA, and winning a NBA championship with the Philadelphia 76ers. Also discussed is his life after he retired from basketball.

programme.title: The Dream Team
programme.desc: The story behind the historic Olympic gold medal run of the 1992 USA Men's Basketball team - the greatest team in sports history.

programme.title: Magic and Bird: A Courtship of Rivals
programme.desc: The history of the rivalry between the Los Angeles Lakers' 'Magic' Johnson and Boston Celtic's Larry Bird. Though they both share Midwestern roots, their personalities could not be any more different.

programme.title: Allen Iverson: The Answer
programme.desc: Steve Smith conducts a frank and candid conversation with Allen Iverson, one of the NBA's most talented, fearless, authentic, and misunderstood players, as he looks forward to Basketball Hall of Fame enshrinement.

programme.title: Bad Boys: 1988 Detroit Pistons
programme.desc: A look at the late-80's Detroit Pistons, nicknamed the Bad Boys, and the many factors that drove one of the best and most complex players in NBA history: Isiah Thomas, a lethal combination of sweetness on the outside and toughness within.

programme.title: The '84 Draft
programme.desc: An extensive look at the 1984 Draft, considered one of the best Drafts of all time. Michael Jordan, Hakeem Olajuwon and Charles Barkley are only a few of the amazing stories that came out of this draft class.

programme.title: Bluegrass Kingdom: The Gospel of Kentucky Basketball
programme.desc: Explore the University of Kentucky's fabled basketball program with a chronology of the Wildcats' history from its origins through the 2012 NCAA championship team.

programme.title: NBA Home Video: Michael Jordan: Come Fly With Me
programme.desc: An hour of classic Michael Jordan highlights focusing on his childhood, his time in college at the University of North Carolina, and his first few seasons with the Chicago Bulls. Spectacular highlights from his NBA career and All-Star games included.

programme.title: NBA Home Video: Michael Jordan: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Michael Jordan speaks out about his first retirement and his incredible return to the NBA. Hear what Michael says on the court, experience his game routine, and learn what drives Michael Jordan to achievements.

programme.title: The Doctor: Dr. J
programme.desc: The definitive look at Julius 'Dr. J' Erving's life and career - growing up in New York, playing in (and carrying) the ABA, and winning a NBA championship with the Philadelphia 76ers. Also discussed is his life after he retired from basketball.

programme.title: The Dream Team
programme.desc: The story behind the historic Olympic gold medal run of the 1992 USA Men's Basketball team - the greatest team in sports history.

programme.title: Basketball Stories: A Decade to Remember
programme.desc: Some of the greatest NBA moments spanning across the 2010s. Experience the best of 10 years worth of Finals, 10 years worth of legendary retirements, 10 years worth of MVP moments, and 10 years worth of All-Star weekends and more.

programme.title: Players Only: Isiah and Magic
programme.desc: Former rivals and NBA Legends Magic Johnson and Isiah Thomas sit down for a wide-ranging and emotional conversation.

programme.title: Players Only: Dwyane Wade and Kevin Garnett
programme.desc: Dwyane Wade and Kevin Garnett sit down for the wide-ranging conversation, with them discussing Wade's first meeting with LeBron James as NBA Draft hopefuls and more.

programme.title: NBA All-Star Interview: Larry Bird and Kevin McHale
programme.desc: Larry Bird and Kevin McHale reflect on their championship winning experiences in Boston, recount some of their favorite memories as teammates and share insights into the qualities and traits that made their Celtics teams some of the best in NBA history.

programme.title: NFL 100 Generations: Sack Masters
programme.desc: Fletcher Cox, Cam Jordan and Von Miller are paired with the NFL's fiercest pass rush legends to celebrate 100 years of the NFL.

programme.title: NFL 100 Generations: Full Coverage
programme.desc: The no-fly zone will be in effect for this celebration of the NFL's centennial as Jamal Adams, Tyrann Mathieu and Jalen Ramsey sit down with the legendary defensive backs that inspired them. Deion Sanders brings his 'prime time' feel to this episode.

programme.title: NFL 100 Generations: Lone Star Trio
programme.desc: A trifecta of pairings from the lone star state, as Deshaun Watson, DeAndre Hopkins and J.J. Watt share stories with the players that influenced and impacted their games. Brett Favre joins and brings a 'hall of fame' feel to the episode.

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Running Backs

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Linebackers
programme.desc: Legendary linebackers come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Ray Lewis, Mike Singletary, Harry Carson, Willie Lanier, and Lawrence Taylor are featured.

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Wide Receivers
programme.desc: Legendary wide receivers come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Jerry Rice, Michael Irvin, Steve Largent and Steve Smith Sr are featured.

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Defensive Backs
programme.desc: Legendary defensive backs come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Deion Sanders, Ronnie Lott, Charles Woodson, Darrell Green, Darrelle Revis and Rod Woodson are featured.

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Defensive Linemen
programme.desc: Legendary defensive linemen come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Michael Strahan, Randy White, Howie Long, Bruce Smith and Jason Taylor are featured.

programme.title: NFL 100 Roundtables: The Quarterbacks
programme.desc: Legendary quarterbacks come together to share their stories in a roundtable discussion. Kurt Warner, John Elway, Jim Kelly, Joe Namath, Roger Staubach and Dan Fouts are featured.

programme.title: Football Classics
programme.desc: October 2, 2010

programme.title: Football Classics
programme.desc: September 15, 2012

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Color Orange: The Condredge Holloway Story
programme.desc: Condredge Holloway became the first African American quarterback in the SEC.

programme.title: SEC Storied: In Search of Derrick Thomas
programme.desc: Derrick Thomas was a legendary college pass rusher and talented linebacker in the NFL before an accident at 33 years old took his life. See how his legacy continues to influence the world years later.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Croom
programme.desc: Coach Sylvester Croom has overcome significant obstacles to impact many lives.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Miracle 3
programme.desc: The story of Mykal Riley's desperation three-point shot that sent the Crimson Tide into overtime of the 2008 SEC basketball tournament and saved thousands of fans from an oncoming tornado.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Herschel Walker
programme.desc: Herschel Walker's career in the SEC was legendary, but his journey off the field was filled with struggle, pain, and ultimately, redemption.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Book of Manning
programme.desc: Written into the pages of football folklore is the Manning legend, a story started by patriarch, Archie, with chapters featuring his sons, Cooper, Peyton and Eli. Director Rory Karpf explores how a tragedy shaped the course of their lives.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Believer
programme.desc: This profile of Steve Spurrier looks at his close ties to the SEC as a young fan, a Heisman Trophy winning quarterback and an accomplished coach.

programme.title: SEC Storied: It's Time
programme.desc: On October 28, 1989, defensive back Chucky Mullins hit running back Brad Gaines and, in the process, broke his own neck. Look at the friendship between these players after Mullins was left as a quadriplegic following the tragic incident.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Tigers United
programme.desc: When Michael Sam announced on February 9, 2014 that he was gay, he became football's first openly gay active player. For most, the revelation was a surprise. For his teammates, it was not news. Michael had found acceptance in the Tigers football family.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Wuerfell's Way
programme.desc: Former Heisman Trophy winner Danny Wuerffel deals with the fallout from Hurricane Katrina's devastation and dedicates himself to charitable outreach in the years following the disaster.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Bo, Barkely and The Big Hurt
programme.desc: Look at how Bo Jackson, Charles Barkley and Frank Thomas turned Auburn University into an athletic powerhouse.

programme.title: SEC Storied: The Walk-Off
programme.desc: Warren Morris hit the most famous home run in college baseball history; a two-run walk off shot which won the national championship.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Thunder and Lightning
programme.desc: Revisiting the fabled Bulldogs and tracking the relationship between Clark and Palmeiro, known as 'Thunder and Lightning.' Director Rory Karpf brings closure to men who should be remembered for what they did and not for what they didn't do.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part One: 1869-1932
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Civil War, America's south is looking to put the past behind it, and finds one path in a growing cultural passion of the north: football. In December 1932, the Southeastern Conference is officially formed.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Two: 1933-1959
programme.desc: Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the 1950s. In 1958, LSU won with star running back Billy Cannon leading the way, and a year later Cannon had epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Eight: 2010-2019
programme.desc: The SEC has a run of seven straight national titles, and nine in 12 years. Expansion in 2012 gives the conference 14 schools. Meanwhile, Nick Saban arguably becomes the greatest coach in the history of college football.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Four: 1969-1979
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: Speak for Yourself With Whitlock and Wiley
programme.desc: Jason Whitlock and Marcellus Wiley cover all of the headlines and most provocative stories from different angles.

programme.title: Lock It In
programme.desc: Host Rachel Bonnetta joined by Clay Travis, Todd Fuhrman, and 'Cousin Sal' Locono present a one-of-a-kind daily sports show featuring the world of sports gambling. See what the experts are saying and who they are putting their hypothetical money on.

programme.title: Fair Game With Kristine Leahy: Best Of: Lakers and Clippers
programme.desc: On the eve of the rematch between the Lakers and Clippers, Kristine shares her favourite moments from the show with Lakers and Clippers, both past and present.

programme.title: Fox College Football Playoff Preview
programme.desc: With the final college football playoff final poll just a week away, a FOX college football panel of experts analyze, discuss and argue who are the top four teams in the country and in line for the playoff.

programme.title: Herd for the Holidays
programme.desc: Host Colin Cowherd celebrates the past year in sports and takes a look what to expect in the year to come.

programme.title: WWE Wrestlemania's Legendary Moments
programme.desc: Relive the most spectacular moments over 35 years featuring legendary WWE Superstars; including Andre the Giant, The Rock, Stone Cold Steve Austin, John Cena, Ric Flair, Hulk Hogan, Ronda Rousey, and Roman Reigns.

programme.title: WWE Friday Night Smackdown!
programme.desc: WWE superstars do battle in elaborate, long-running rivalries.

programme.title: WWE Backstage

programme.title: Military Makeover: Wojcik Family
programme.desc: The Wojcik's home gets brought into the 21st century.

programme.title: Movie: A League of Their Own

programme.title: Movie: Stepmom
programme.desc: A woman teaches both herself and her children to accept her ex-husband's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Movie: Fool's Gold
programme.desc: A married couple rekindle their marriage and romance on an adventure to find a treasure.

programme.title: Movie: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A morning talk show producer is appalled by the chauvinistic host that her boss has recently hired. The new host challenges all of her beliefs in relationships but she takes his advice when she finds herself in a new relationship.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Evidence
programme.desc: The story of an investigator who captured a shoe impression made in snow.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police are called to the scene of what appears to be an accidental drowning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A popular disc jockey is found murdered in a community garden. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert lead police to the killer... and he’d been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: Exactly one year after beginning an affair with his friend's wife, a man vanishes. It's not until 15 years and a metal detector later that investigators will uncover the truth behind the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: With no suspects or motives, investigators can't make sense of a murder when a young woman is found dead near the highway. A tiny piece of unique fibre on the victim's clothing will lead to the most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: An Army veteran, an ultra-marathoner, and a world record weightlifter face the biggest battles of their lives as they take on Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank in challenges of strength, speed, and strategy, but it's the underdog who shocks Bear Mountain.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Human Kannonball
programme.desc: With odds stacked against them, a bodyguard, a firefighter and an ultra-fit football coach take on three massive grizzlies in a gauntlet of challenges. As they fight for a place in the finale, each discovers just how badly bears don't like to lose.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Tower Top Hand
programme.desc: Mike help erect a radio tower in North Dakota. Mike is commemorated in Hollywood for doing a dirty job in each of the 50 states.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Medical Waste
programme.desc: Mike travels to Sioux Falls and South Dakota to spend the day working as a medical waste processor.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Water Softener Technician
programme.desc: Mike travels to Moorhead, Minnesota, to work as a water softener technician. Then he heads to the Westin St. Francis hotel in San Francisco where he takes on the job of a coin washer.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mardi Gras Bladder Banger
programme.desc: Mike travels to Mobile, Alabama to get a behind-the-scenes look at a Mardi Gras folly float. He spends his day assembling cow bladders that will be used during the parade to drive away evil spirits.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Fossil Hunter
programme.desc: Mike travels to a remote area near Moab, Utah, to take on the job of being a paleontologist.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Barber's Assistant/ Landfill Operator
programme.desc: In Mobile, Alabama, Mike studies old school tricks to cutting hair with a local barber. Mike then stops by the Ostrom Road Landfill in California.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mule Logger
programme.desc: Mike teams up with a master-cooper, also known as a barrel maker, and attempts to master the art of toasting the inside of barrels over an open flame. It is the toasting that gives the wine a special flavor while it ferments.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Penguin Keeper
programme.desc: Mike Rowe joins a rowdy construction crew in California and learns the art of concrete stamping. Mike later takes care of some penguins and digs for bloodworms.

programme.title: Serengeti: Destiny
programme.desc: With food in abundance it's the time of plenty in the Serengeti, but a series of unexpected events turns families against each other and stretches relationships to breaking point.

programme.title: Serengeti: Conflict
programme.desc: As the Serengeti starts to dry out, competition heats up between the families we met in Episode One. The strong females take center stage, dealing with headstrong males and fighting for the survival of their kin.

programme.title: Serengeti: Invasion
programme.desc: The anticipation of the annual Great Migration is being felt by all of the Serengeti's families as they wait with great desperation for it to arrive. The land continues to get hotter and hunger starts to bite as food becomes even more scarce.

programme.title: Serengeti: Misfortune
programme.desc: The long-awaited arrival of the Great Migration brings opportunities and food in abundance, but it also increases conflict as every one of the Serengeti's families is put to the test.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Worst Day Ever: Rear Ended
programme.desc: Two separate car crash victims are brought to the ER in their underwear. A woman is acting delusional and refuses to allow the ER staff to touch her.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Celebration Stoppers
programme.desc: Celebrations morph into medical mania after their special occasions land them in the ER. From life threatening to the light hearted, mysterious to bizarre, hear their outrageous stories, as told through the eyes of the doctors.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Didn't See That Coming
programme.desc: Doctors join impaled patients for a round or two of 'How Did That Get There.'

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Wedding Day Mishaps
programme.desc: A bride isn't sure if she is having wedding jitters or something more serious is going on. A bride at the ER refuses to remove her gown. Another bride's make-up mishap leaves her cringing. Find out if these three brides will make it to the altar on time.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The 12 Pops of Christmas
programme.desc: Dr. Lee tries to help all her patients look their best before the holidays. Her office is decorated in all the holiday trimmings, and her elves are hard at work remedying her patient’s skin issues.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: First Look: peh-DUN-kyoo-LAY-ted
programme.desc: Traci's confidence has been destroyed after years of bullying from the bumps that have plagued her face. Ravon has a unique dangling growth on his leg. David has a large lump that envelopes his nose, but a surprise encounter gives him hope.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: A Lipoma Is Born
programme.desc: Barbara's back lump became more noticeable after she lost 131 pounds. Bob has two painful bumps on his back. Hilda's depression is a result of the multitude of bumps on her eyelids. Art has one big bump on his head that he covers up with hats.

programme.title: The Man With the 200 lb Tumor
programme.desc: In a remote region of Viet Nam, Hai has been bed-ridden for six years, weighed down by what is possibly the largest tumour in the world.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Kanchana/ Susannah
programme.desc: Kanchana fears her pregnancy will push her Nepalese family away. Susannah is having a third child with a jobless husband.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Richanne/ Paola
programme.desc: Richanne learned she was pregnant just days after being diagnosed with a brain tumour. Paola's pregnancy could damage her image as a bikini model and ruin her career.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Charity/ Natasha
programme.desc: Two women are hiding their pregnancies for very different reasons. Charity already has five children and Natasha thinks her boyfriend will leave her.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Sandra/ Dannielle
programme.desc: Sandra's grown daughters disapprove of her boyfriend, and news of her pregnancy could destroy their relationship. Dannielle risks her relationship with and support from her grandfather if he discovers she is pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Ashley/ Amatualla
programme.desc: Ashley fears her family will disapprove of her pregnancy as she's expecting her fourth child. Amatulla is ashamed of being pregnant again with James's baby.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Krystal/ Danie
programme.desc: Krystal is keeping the baby a secret from her mother-in-law due to their dire financial situation. Dannie fears that if she tells her dad she's pregnant he will reject her child the way he rejected Danie as a kid.

programme.title: Secretly Pregnant: Bethany/ Cecily
programme.desc: Bethany is pregnant by a guy who just got another woman pregnant too. Cecily fears her pregnancy will open old wounds.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby and the Bathwater
programme.desc: Claire discovers she is pregnant and in labour while in her bathtub, alone at home.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Born In a Dorm Room
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old coed, Elizabeth wakes in the middle of the night with debilitating stomach cramps, she makes a shocking discovery. Will her 19-year-old roommate be able to save her baby from a dangerous complication?

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby at a Rest Stop
programme.desc: A cross-country move takes a major detour when the young wife, not knowing that she is pregnant, goes into labour at a deserted interstate rest area.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Bun in the Oven
programme.desc: Celia, a single woman who has resigned herself to being childless, goes to the Emergency Room twice before a shocking diagnosis is made.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Twin Baby Surprise
programme.desc: When Jasmine is taken to the hospital with abdominal cramps, she is stunned to learn she's in labour with a breech baby and shocked that there's a twin.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Crash and Born
programme.desc: When a student has a seizure behind the wheel, doctors discover that what's ailing her is much more serious than fatigue.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby on a Boat
programme.desc: A woman has unexplained severe abdominal cramps while on a boat and in the middle of the open water.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby on the Job
programme.desc: Debilitating stomach pains overwhelm Dana, and she is stunned when paramedics arrive in time to deliver a baby at her work's parking lot.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Dr. Sandra Lee is a renowned dermatological surgeon who is tasked with removing life-altering growths from her patients' skin so they can try to reclaim their lives.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: With her high school graduation coming up, a teenage girl must choose between her vampire boyfriend and her werewolf friend.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: Edward and Bella's unborn child is a risk to the citizens of Forks and to the Wolf Pack.

programme.title: Movie: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: The Volturi are in uproar upon learning of the birth of Edward and Bella's child, Renesmee. In order to protect the innocent child from destruction, the Cullens and the wolves come together in battle.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dark Side of the Moon
programme.desc: The guys make passes at supermarket shoppers, then pose as reporters. Then, with a painfully invasive punishment, tonight's loser is the butt of the joke.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Whose Phone Is Ringing?
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr hit a bull's-eye at a clothing store, sabotage each other in a focus group, and the big loser is called upon at a book reading.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Coward
programme.desc: The guys show who's boss at a fast food joint and whisper sweet nothings at a grocery store. Then, the big loser helps a cow in labor, and almost buys the farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dr. Bones
programme.desc: Michael explores the true depth of a deep-dish pizza, and later, he plays doctor to a patient questioning his own vision and sanity. Plus, as a locksmith, Michael stuns his assistant with a surprise on the other side of the door.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dummy Talks
programme.desc: At an appliance store, a man goes bananas over Michael's self-stocking fridge. Then, Michael speeds up the life cycle of a frog in a science lab, and he pulls the strings at an estate sale when a haunted doll toys with his assistant.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.desc: The Mecum Auction crew heads to Kissimmee Fla., and works like an orchestra with the auctioneer calling bids, the ring men working the crowd for bids and a ring man working the sellers to get them to accept the bids.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Very Kardashian Holiday Special: Pop-Up Edition!
programme.desc: Celebrate the holidays with a throwback holiday episode from 2017 full of exclusive behind-the-scenes Kardashian fun facts.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Christmas Chaos
programme.desc: Kris reluctantly allows Kim to take over the annual Christmas Eve Party, but the holiday is in jeopardy when Kris learns Kim has invited an unwelcome guest. Khloe must come to the rescue when North’s beloved hamster unexpectedly dies and Kim can’t deal.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashian Rewind
programme.desc: Take a nostalgic look back at the stories that made the Kardashians who they are today, with an exclusive look ahead to season 11.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Close Encounters of the Kardashian Kind
programme.desc: Khloe distracts herself from troubles at home by using Bruce's camping trip to hunt for aliens. Meanwhile, Kris wants her family's support while launching her new talk show.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kylie's Sweet 16
programme.desc: Kylie chooses to plan her Sweet 16 without the help of Kris. Meanwhile, Rob has a serious conversation with Khloe about their current situation and Kris is forced to babysit a pig.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Loving and Letting Go
programme.desc: Kris and Bruce have major decisions to make concerning their future together. Meanwhile, Khloe continues to deal with her changing relationship with Lamar.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: How to Deal
programme.desc: Khloé is hurt by an interview which contains negative comments about her and her family. Kris gets Jonathan to sneak away from Kim for a trip to Sonoma. Scott takes up karate to satisfy his couples therapy homework.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: And All That Jazzzzzzz
programme.desc: Khloé doesn’t feel comfortable in her house so Rob invites her to move in with him. Kris gets bitten by the Broadway bug and starts taking singing and dancing lessons and Kourtney sneaks to Las Vegas to catch Scott in a lie.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Surprise Engagement Part 1
programme.desc: The family hears about a surprise Kanye is planning for Kim's birthday. Kris goes into panic mode when she learns Kim's house is delayed and Kourtney and Khloé plot revenge on judgmental Kim.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: A Surprise Engagement Part 2
programme.desc: The family gathers in San Francisco to surprise Kim on her birthday but the real surprise is Kanye proposing to Kim. Meanwhile, Scott heads to New York to spend time with his father and sick mother.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Two Birthdays and a Yard Sale
programme.desc: Kourtney attempts to organize a family yard sale. Kendall prepares for her 18th birthday and makes plans to move out of the house, while Bruce tries to pretend his upcoming birthday is no big deal.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: We're reviewing the year's biggest feuds, craziest reality TV moments, top fashion moments and more.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Keeping Up: Kardashians on Vacation
programme.desc: Travel around the world with Kim and the gang, as the defining moments from each of the Kardashian family vacations are recapped.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy
programme.desc: Kim and Kourtney plan a joint birthday party for their daughters, but a disagreement over candy puts the special day in jeopardy. Kris is concerned about some of Khloe's obsessive behavior and enlists the help of a professional.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Kim and Khloe are furious that Kourtney is hiding aspects of her life from the cameras and attempt to fire her from the show. Kim helps a young man recently out of prison with his future.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Cheesiest

programme.desc: The market has been turned into a midway so that four carnival food chefs can compete for a jackpot worth up to $20,000. First, they try their luck spinning a wheel of chance for the ingredients in their fried classic. Next, chefs play Guy Fieri's arcade.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Christmas Goodies
programme.desc: It's just a few days before Christmas, and Ree Drummond is making a slew of Christmas goodies as gifts. They come in all flavors, shapes and sizes, including homemade gumdrops, cayenne cheese straws, and cornflake Christmas wreaths.

programme.title: Ridiculous Cakes: Trolls Cake
programme.desc: A cake artist encounters some hair-raising challenges while taking a Troll from the big screen to a cake.

programme.title: Ridiculous Cakes: Star-Studded Cast Gets Caked
programme.desc: Cakes include a mythical creation for a 40th birthday party, a music-playing tribute to the 1950's and a cake for the cast and crew of 'Modern Family' to celebrate their 200th episode.

programme.title: Ridiculous Cakes: Till Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A non-traditional bride and groom take the vow 'till death do us part' literally when they order a skeleton cake for their wedding. A young man's bar mitzvah cake is a home run, and one bakery makes some moves when they put hydraulics on a car cake.

programme.title: Ridiculous Cakes: This Cake Rocks!
programme.desc: Three cake artists create dream cakes that defy expectations including a giant planet Earth that weighs more than a motorcycle, a Bollywood-themed chandelier that lights up and a confectionary celebration of a beloved children's series.

programme.title: Ridiculous Cakes: Fairy Cakes Can Come True
programme.desc: Cakes include an island-themed cake for a Polynesian dance troupe, a fantasy fairy cake and a high-fashion cake for a stylish birthday party.

programme.title: Ridiculous Cakes: Pretty Ponies
programme.desc: My Little Pony comes to life in cake for one lucky girl's horse-themed birthday party. A cake proves to be a real bear for a Portland cake artist, and things could get messy when another cake artist uses only buttercream to decorate a cake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Four Under 40
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's dishing up four incredibly easy meals in less than 40 minutes. First up is her Chicken with Pesto Cream, the perfect food fix for a quick working dinner. Next, Cajun Veggie Pasta is brilliant for kids when you are in a time crunch.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: A Tale of Four Lunches
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's whipping up four legendary lunches, from crowd pleasers to solo pleasures. There's spicy chuck burgers piled high with onion rings, plus a mother-daughter lunchtime collaboration of sesame tofu salad.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Peyton's Places: Volume 1
programme.desc: Peyton Manning visits places associated with the NFL. Taking a spin in the Hupmobile with Jay Leno, throwing a pass to Cris Carter off the Radiator Building in NYC, using Stickum with Fred Biletnikoff and confronting Ray Lewis.

programme.title: Peyton's Places: Volume 2
programme.desc: Peyton meets the super fans from SNL. Brett Favre and Peyton walk through some of the key stories from his consecutive starts streak and Eli and Peyton go to the house that the Lombardi Trophy was first conceived.

programme.title: Peyton's Places: Volume 3
programme.desc: Deion Sanders teaches Peyton how to play defensive back. Peyton is in Green Bay to get the story behind Brett Favre's first touchdown pass in the Super Bowl. Plus, Eli tells Peyton how he saw the final Giants drive when they won Super Bowl XLII.

programme.title: Peyton's Places: Volume 4
programme.desc: Legendary quarterback Peyton Manning hosts and revisits seminal moments in NFL history.

programme.desc: A beautiful, popular graduate student is shot dead outside her apartment in Durham, North Carolina. We take a look at who would want her dead and why.

programme.title: Dateline: The Trap
programme.desc: A housewife in an exclusive neighborhood in Long Beach, California is murdered in broad daylight while cops surround her home. The suspected killer claims it was a burglary gone wrong, but detectives discover something more sinister.

programme.title: Dateline Extra: Deadly Twist
programme.desc: The murder of a beautiful California mom beloved by four men reopens a puzzling mystery surrounding the untimely death of another young woman decades earlier on a desolate mountain trail in Georgia.
